src.training.trainer

Training loop with stability controls for TORMENTED-BERT-Frankenstein.

Provides TitanTrainer, a production-grade training loop with gradient clipping, NaN detection and retry, rolling/best checkpointing, GPU thermal guard integration, CSV telemetry logging, GaLore low-rank gradient projection, and automatic mixed precision support.

   1"""Training loop with stability controls for TORMENTED-BERT-Frankenstein.
   2
   3Provides :class:`TitanTrainer`, a production-grade training loop with
   4gradient clipping, NaN detection and retry, rolling/best checkpointing,
   5GPU thermal guard integration, CSV telemetry logging, GaLore low-rank
   6gradient projection, and automatic mixed precision support.
   7"""
   8
   9import os
  10import csv
  11import torch
  12import logging
  13import math
  14import heapq
  15import time
  16import re
  17import subprocess
  18from datetime import datetime
  19from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  20from typing import Any, List, Tuple, Optional, Dict
  21from tqdm import tqdm
  22import torch.optim as optim
  23from torch.amp import autocast, GradScaler
  24from torch.utils.data import DataLoader
  25from torch.nn.utils import clip_grad_norm_
  26import torch.nn.functional as F
  27
  28try:
  29    from ..utils.storage_manager import StorageManager
  30    from ..utils.gpu_temp_guard import GPUTelemetryError, GPUTemperatureGuard
  31    from ..model.optimizer.factory import build_optimizer
  32except ImportError:
  33    from utils.storage_manager import StorageManager
  34    from utils.gpu_temp_guard import GPUTelemetryError, GPUTemperatureGuard
  35    from model.optimizer.factory import build_optimizer
  36
  37
  38# ==================== TRAINING CONFIGURATION ====================
  39@dataclass
  40class TrainingConfig:
  41    """Configuration for training behavior, checkpointing, and stability controls.
  42
  43    Attributes:
  44        csv_log_path: Path for CSV training metrics log.
  45        csv_rotate_on_schema_change: If ``True``, rotate the CSV file when
  46            the column schema changes instead of raising an error.
  47        gpu_metrics_backend: GPU telemetry backend (``"nvml"`` or ``"none"``).
  48        nvml_device_index: NVML device index for multi-GPU systems.
  49        enable_block_grad_norms: Whether to collect per-block gradient norms.
  50        telemetry_log_interval: Steps between heavy telemetry collection.
  51        gpu_temp_guard_enabled: Whether GPU thermal guard is enabled.
  52        switch_on_thermal: Whether GPU→CPU thermal switching is enabled.
  53        gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c: Temperature in Celsius above which
  54            training is paused.
  55        gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c: Temperature in Celsius below which
  56            training resumes.
  57        gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c: Optional critical temperature for
  58            emergency GPU→CPU offload.
  59        gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds: Seconds between temperature polls
  60            while paused.
  61        checkpoint_every_n_steps: Save a rolling checkpoint every N steps.
  62        max_rolling_checkpoints: Maximum number of rolling checkpoints to keep.
  63        num_best_checkpoints: Number of best-loss checkpoints to retain.
  64        nan_check_interval: Check for NaN loss every N steps.
  65        log_gradient_stats: Whether to log gradient statistics.
  66        gradient_log_interval: Steps between gradient stat logging.
  67        gradient_accumulation_steps: Number of steps to accumulate gradients
  68            before an optimizer update.
  69        optimizer_class: Optimizer class name (e.g. ``"adamw"``).
  70        optimizer_parameters: Dictionary of optimizer-specific parameters.
  71        scheduler_total_steps: Total steps for the learning rate scheduler.
  72        scheduler_warmup_ratio: Fraction of total steps used for warmup.
  73        scheduler_type: Scheduler type (``"cosine"``, ``"constant"``, or
  74            ``"linear_warmup_then_constant"``).
  75        max_nan_retries: Maximum retries per batch when NaN is detected.
  76        grad_clip_max_norm: Maximum gradient norm for clipping.
  77        inf_post_clip_threshold: Gradient norm above which the step is
  78            considered to have exploding gradients.
  79        min_grad_norm_for_signal: Minimum gradient norm below which
  80            gradients are considered zero.
  81        inf_epoch_patience: Consecutive inf-epochs before early stop.
  82        zero_grad_plateau_patience: Consecutive zero-gradient plateau
  83            epochs before early stop.
  84        use_galore: Whether to enable GaLore low-rank gradient projection.
  85        galore_rank: Rank for GaLore SVD projection.
  86        galore_update_interval: Steps between GaLore projection updates.
  87        galore_scale: Scaling factor for GaLore projected gradients.
  88        galore_max_dim: Maximum dimension for GaLore projection.
  89        use_amp: Whether to use automatic mixed precision (FP16/BF16).
  90    """
  91    # CSV Logging
  92    csv_log_path: str = "training_metrics.csv"
  93    csv_rotate_on_schema_change: bool = True
  94    gpu_metrics_backend: str = "nvml"
  95    nvml_device_index: int = 0
  96    enable_block_grad_norms: bool = True
  97    telemetry_log_interval: int = 1
  98    gpu_temp_guard_enabled: bool = True
  99    switch_on_thermal: bool = False
 100    gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c: float = 90.0
 101    gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c: float = 80.0
 102    gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c: Optional[float] = None
 103    gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds: float = 30.0
 104    
 105    # Rolling Checkpoints
 106    checkpoint_every_n_steps: int = 500  # Save every N steps
 107    max_rolling_checkpoints: int = 3     # Keep only last N rolling checkpoints
 108    
 109    # Best Model Checkpoints
 110    num_best_checkpoints: int = 2        # Keep top K best models
 111    
 112    # NaN Detection
 113    nan_check_interval: int = 10         # Check for NaN every N steps
 114    
 115    # Gradient monitoring
 116    log_gradient_stats: bool = True
 117    gradient_log_interval: int = 100
 118    gradient_accumulation_steps: int = 4
 119
 120    # Optimizer chooser (hard-migrated format from YAML)
 121    optimizer_class: str = "adamw"
 122    optimizer_parameters: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
 123
 124    # Scheduler configuration
 125    scheduler_total_steps: int = 10000
 126    scheduler_warmup_ratio: float = 0.1
 127    scheduler_type: str = "cosine"
 128
 129    # Post-backward stability
 130    max_nan_retries: int = 3
 131    grad_clip_max_norm: float = 5.0  # Increased from 1.0 - too aggressive clipping was causing issues
 132    inf_post_clip_threshold: float = 100.0  # Increased from 10.0 - more conservative threshold
 133    min_grad_norm_for_signal: float = 1e-10
 134    inf_epoch_patience: int = 5
 135    zero_grad_plateau_patience: int = 5
 136
 137    # GaLore (low-rank gradient projection)
 138    use_galore: bool = False
 139    galore_rank: int = 64
 140    galore_update_interval: int = 1
 141    galore_scale: float = 1.0
 142    galore_max_dim: int = 4096
 143
 144    # Precision control
 145    # NOTE: Default False because hybrid ODE/SSM blocks can become unstable in fp16 on older GPUs (e.g., Tesla P40).
 146    use_amp: bool = False
 147
 148# ==================== TITAN TRAINER ====================
 149class TitanTrainer:
 150    """Advanced trainer for TORMENTED-BERT-Frankenstein with stability controls.
 151
 152    Implements a production-grade training loop with gradient accumulation,
 153    automatic mixed precision (AMP), gradient clipping, NaN detection with
 154    automatic retry and learning rate scaling, rolling and best-loss
 155    checkpointing, GPU thermal guard integration, GaLore low-rank gradient
 156    projection, and CSV telemetry logging.
 157
 158    Attributes:
 159        model: The PyTorch model being trained.
 160        config: Model configuration (:class:`UltraConfig` or HF config).
 161        training_config: :class:`TrainingConfig` with stability parameters.
 162        device: Resolved PyTorch device string.
 163        optimizer: Configured optimizer with per-component parameter groups.
 164        scaler: AMP gradient scaler.
 165        scheduler: Learning rate scheduler with warmup.
 166        storage_manager: :class:`StorageManager` for disk usage tracking.
 167        global_step: Current global training step counter.
 168        best_loss: Best (lowest) loss observed so far.
 169        gradient_accumulation_steps: Number of steps between optimizer updates.
 170        gpu_temp_guard: :class:`GPUTemperatureGuard` for thermal safety.
 171    """
 172
 173    def __init__(self, model: torch.nn.Module, config: Optional[Any],
 174                 training_config: TrainingConfig = None,
 175                 device: str = None): #torch.device = None):
 176        """Initialize the trainer.
 177
 178        Args:
 179            model: PyTorch model to train.
 180            config: Model configuration object (e.g. :class:`UltraConfig`).
 181            training_config: :class:`TrainingConfig` with stability and
 182                checkpointing parameters. Uses defaults if ``None``.
 183            device: Target device string. Defaults to CUDA if available,
 184                otherwise CPU.
 185        """
 186        self.model = model
 187        self.config = config
 188        self.training_config = training_config or TrainingConfig()
 189        self.device = device if device else ("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
 190        self._primary_device = str(self.device)
 191        if (
 192            self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c is not None
 193            and self._primary_device.startswith("cuda")
 194        ):
 195            self.training_config.switch_on_thermal = True
 196        self._configured_use_amp = bool(self.training_config.use_amp)
 197        self.use_amp = (
 198            self._configured_use_amp
 199            and torch.cuda.is_available()
 200            and self._primary_device.startswith("cuda")
 201        )
 202        self.amp_dtype = torch.float16
 203        if self.use_amp and torch.cuda.is_bf16_supported():
 204            self.amp_dtype = torch.bfloat16
 205        self.model.to(self.device)
 206        
 207        # Specialized optimizer for hybrid architecture
 208        self.optimizer = self._setup_optimizer()
 209        
 210        # Mixed precision with aggressive scaling for BitNet
 211        self.scaler = GradScaler(
 212            self.device,
 213            init_scale=2.**10,  # Lower initial scale for BitNet stability
 214            growth_factor=1.5,  # Conservative growth
 215            backoff_factor=0.8,
 216            growth_interval=100
 217        )
 218        
 219        # Learning rate scheduler with warmup for ODE dynamics
 220        self.scheduler = self._setup_scheduler()
 221        
 222        # Storage monitoring
 223        self.storage_manager = StorageManager()
 224        
 225        # Training state tracking
 226        self.global_step = 0
 227        self.best_loss = float('inf')
 228        
 229        # Gradient accumulation for effective larger batches
 230        self.gradient_accumulation_steps = max(int(self.training_config.gradient_accumulation_steps), 1)
 231        
 232        # === NEW: CSV Logger ===
 233        self.csv_file = None
 234        self.csv_writer = None
 235        self.csv_columns = self._get_csv_columns()
 236
 237        # Optional NVML state (best-effort telemetry)
 238        self._nvml_module = None
 239        self._nvml_handle = None
 240        self._nvml_disabled = False
 241        self._nvml_warning_logged = False
 242        self._last_guard_temp_c: Optional[float] = None
 243        self._pending_thermal_repair_action = "none"
 244        self._thermal_offload_active = False
 245        self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic: Optional[float] = None
 246        self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = 0.0
 247        self._thermal_emergency_last_checkpoint: Optional[str] = None
 248        self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error = False
 249        self.gpu_temp_guard = GPUTemperatureGuard(
 250            enabled=bool(self.training_config.gpu_temp_guard_enabled),
 251            device=str(self.device),
 252            nvml_device_index=int(self.training_config.nvml_device_index),
 253            pause_threshold_c=float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c),
 254            resume_threshold_c=float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c),
 255            critical_threshold_c=self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c,
 256            poll_interval_seconds=float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds),
 257        )
 258
 259        self._init_csv_logger()
 260        
 261        # === NEW: Rolling checkpoint tracking ===
 262        self.rolling_checkpoints: List[str] = []  # FIFO queue of checkpoint paths
 263        self.thermal_emergency_checkpoints: List[str] = []
 264        
 265        # === NEW: Best checkpoints tracking (min-heap by negative loss for max extraction) ===
 266        # Format: [(-loss, checkpoint_path), ...]
 267        self.best_checkpoints: List[Tuple[float, str]] = []
 268        
 269        # === NEW: NaN detection state ===
 270        self.nan_detected = False
 271        self.last_valid_state = None  # For debugging
 272
 273        # Stability / early-stop state
 274        self.current_epoch_had_inf = False
 275        self.consecutive_inf_epochs = 0
 276        self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs = 0
 277        self.non_improving_epochs = 0
 278        
 279        self._log_setup()
 280
 281    def _get_csv_columns(self) -> List[str]:
 282        """CSV schema for step-level training metrics."""
 283        return [
 284            'timestamp', 'epoch', 'step', 'global_step',
 285            'loss', 'accuracy', 'learning_rate', 'grad_norm',
 286            'scaler_scale', 'gpu_memory_gb', 'gpu_cached_gb',
 287            'has_nan', 'has_inf', 'has_zero', 'repair_action',
 288            'gpu_temp_c', 'gpu_power_w', 'gpu_util_pct', 'gpu_mem_used_mib',
 289            'grad_norm_embeddings', 'grad_norm_attention', 'grad_norm_ffn',
 290            'grad_norm_experts', 'grad_norm_router', 'grad_norm_ode',
 291            'grad_norm_retnet', 'grad_norm_mamba', 'grad_norm_norms',
 292            'grad_norm_head', 'grad_norm_other',
 293            'step_time_ms', 'tokens_per_sec', 'clip_ratio', 'effective_batch_size'
 294        ]
 295
 296    def _get_default_gpu_telemetry(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 297        return {
 298            "gpu_temp_c": 0.0,
 299            "gpu_power_w": 0.0,
 300            "gpu_util_pct": 0.0,
 301            "gpu_mem_used_mib": 0.0,
 302        }
 303
 304    def _get_default_block_grad_norms(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 305        return {
 306            "embeddings": 0.0,
 307            "attention": 0.0,
 308            "ffn": 0.0,
 309            "experts": 0.0,
 310            "router": 0.0,
 311            "ode": 0.0,
 312            "retnet": 0.0,
 313            "mamba": 0.0,
 314            "norms": 0.0,
 315            "head": 0.0,
 316            "other": 0.0,
 317        }
 318
 319    def _append_repair_action(self, current: str, extra: str) -> str:
 320        cur = str(current or "none").strip() or "none"
 321        add = str(extra or "none").strip() or "none"
 322        if add == "none":
 323            return cur
 324        if cur == "none":
 325            return add
 326        existing = set(cur.split("+"))
 327        if add in existing:
 328            return cur
 329        return f"{cur}+{add}"
 330
 331    def _register_thermal_emergency_checkpoint(self, checkpoint_path: str):
 332        self.thermal_emergency_checkpoints.append(checkpoint_path)
 333        max_keep = max(int(self.training_config.max_rolling_checkpoints), 1)
 334        while len(self.thermal_emergency_checkpoints) > max_keep:
 335            old_checkpoint = self.thermal_emergency_checkpoints.pop(0)
 336            try:
 337                if os.path.exists(old_checkpoint):
 338                    os.remove(old_checkpoint)
 339                    logging.info(
 340                        "🗑️ Removed old thermal emergency checkpoint: %s",
 341                        old_checkpoint,
 342                    )
 343            except Exception as exc:
 344                logging.warning(
 345                    "Failed to remove old thermal emergency checkpoint %s: %s",
 346                    old_checkpoint,
 347                    exc,
 348                )
 349
 350    def _save_thermal_emergency_checkpoint(self, epoch: int, batch_idx: int, temp_c: float) -> str:
 351        safe_temp = str(f"{float(temp_c):.1f}").replace(".", "p")
 352        suffix = (
 353            f"_thermal_emergency_step_{self.global_step}"
 354            f"_batch_{batch_idx + 1}_temp_{safe_temp}c"
 355        )
 356        checkpoint_path = self.save_checkpoint(epoch, suffix=suffix)
 357        self._register_thermal_emergency_checkpoint(checkpoint_path)
 358        logging.warning(
 359            "🚨 Thermal emergency checkpoint created before GPU offload: %s",
 360            checkpoint_path,
 361        )
 362        return checkpoint_path
 363
 364    def _move_optimizer_state_tensors(self, device: str):
 365        target = torch.device(device)
 366
 367        def _move_value(value):
 368            if torch.is_tensor(value):
 369                return value.to(target)
 370            if isinstance(value, dict):
 371                return {k: _move_value(v) for k, v in value.items()}
 372            if isinstance(value, list):
 373                return [_move_value(v) for v in value]
 374            if isinstance(value, tuple):
 375                return tuple(_move_value(v) for v in value)
 376            return value
 377
 378        for param_state in self.optimizer.state.values():
 379            if not isinstance(param_state, dict):
 380                continue
 381            for key, value in list(param_state.items()):
 382                param_state[key] = _move_value(value)
 383
 384    def _offload_training_state_to_cpu(self):
 385        self.model.to("cpu")
 386        self._move_optimizer_state_tensors("cpu")
 387        self.device = "cpu"
 388        self.use_amp = False
 389        if torch.cuda.is_available():
 390            torch.cuda.empty_cache()
 391
 392    def _reload_training_state_to_device(self):
 393        target_device = self._primary_device
 394        self.model.to(target_device)
 395        self._move_optimizer_state_tensors(target_device)
 396        self.device = target_device
 397        self.use_amp = (
 398            self._configured_use_amp
 399            and torch.cuda.is_available()
 400            and str(target_device).startswith("cuda")
 401        )
 402        if torch.cuda.is_available():
 403            torch.cuda.empty_cache()
 404
 405    def _wait_for_gpu_resume_temperature(self, context: str) -> Tuple[float, float, int]:
 406        resume_threshold = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.resume_threshold_c)
 407        poll_interval = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.poll_interval_seconds)
 408        temp_c = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.read_temperature_c())
 409        checks = 0
 410        started = time.perf_counter()
 411        while temp_c > resume_threshold:
 412            logging.warning(
 413                "[ThermalOffload] %s waiting on CPU: GPU %.1fC (resume <= %.1fC)",
 414                context,
 415                temp_c,
 416                resume_threshold,
 417            )
 418            time.sleep(poll_interval)
 419            checks += 1
 420            temp_c = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.read_temperature_c())
 421        duration_s = time.perf_counter() - started
 422        return temp_c, duration_s, checks
 423
 424    def _is_cuda_or_nvidia_runtime_error(self, exc: RuntimeError) -> bool:
 425        message = str(exc).lower()
 426        gpu_error_tokens = (
 427            "cuda",
 428            "cudnn",
 429            "cublas",
 430            "device-side assert",
 431            "nvidia",
 432            "driver",
 433            "out of memory",
 434        )
 435        return any(token in message for token in gpu_error_tokens)
 436
 437    def _switch_to_cpu_only_after_gpu_error(
 438        self,
 439        *,
 440        exc: RuntimeError,
 441        epoch: int,
 442        batch_idx: int,
 443    ) -> bool:
 444        if not bool(self.training_config.switch_on_thermal):
 445            return False
 446        if self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error:
 447            return False
 448        if not self._is_cuda_or_nvidia_runtime_error(exc):
 449            return False
 450        if not str(self.device).startswith("cuda"):
 451            return False
 452
 453        logging.error(
 454            "[ThermalSwitch] GPU runtime error detected; switching to CPU-only mode for remaining training: %s",
 455            exc,
 456        )
 457        try:
 458            checkpoint_path = self.save_checkpoint(
 459                epoch,
 460                suffix=f"_gpu_error_cpu_fallback_step_{self.global_step}_batch_{batch_idx + 1}",
 461            )
 462            self._register_thermal_emergency_checkpoint(checkpoint_path)
 463            self._thermal_emergency_last_checkpoint = checkpoint_path
 464            logging.warning(
 465                "[ThermalSwitch] Saved GPU error emergency checkpoint: %s",
 466                checkpoint_path,
 467            )
 468        except Exception as ckpt_exc:
 469            logging.exception(
 470                "[ThermalSwitch] Failed to save GPU error emergency checkpoint: %s",
 471                ckpt_exc,
 472            )
 473
 474        self._offload_training_state_to_cpu()
 475        self._thermal_offload_active = False
 476        self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic = None
 477        self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = 0.0
 478        self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error = True
 479        return True
 480
 481    def _monitor_thermal_offload_and_maybe_reload(self, epoch: int, batch_idx: int) -> str:
 482        if not self._thermal_offload_active:
 483            return "none"
 484        if self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error:
 485            return "thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error"
 486
 487        context = f"mlm epoch={epoch + 1} batch={batch_idx + 1}"
 488        now = time.perf_counter()
 489        started = (
 490            self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic
 491            if self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic is not None
 492            else now
 493        )
 494        elapsed_s = max(now - started, 0.0)
 495        poll_interval = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.poll_interval_seconds)
 496        if (now - self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic) < poll_interval:
 497            return f"thermal_cpu_training_{int(round(elapsed_s))}s"
 498
 499        self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = now
 500        temp_c = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.read_temperature_c())
 501        self._last_guard_temp_c = temp_c
 502        resume_threshold = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.resume_threshold_c)
 503        if temp_c > resume_threshold:
 504            logging.warning(
 505                "[ThermalOffload] %s continuing CPU training: GPU %.1fC (resume <= %.1fC)",
 506                context,
 507                temp_c,
 508                resume_threshold,
 509            )
 510            return f"thermal_cpu_training_{int(round(elapsed_s))}s"
 511
 512        checkpoint_path = self._thermal_emergency_last_checkpoint
 513        try:
 514            self._reload_training_state_to_device()
 515        except Exception as exc:
 516            logging.error(
 517                "[ThermalSwitch] Failed to reload to GPU after thermal CPU mode. "
 518                "Switching to CPU-only mode. Emergency checkpoint: %s. Error: %s",
 519                checkpoint_path or "unavailable",
 520                exc,
 521            )
 522            self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error = True
 523            self._thermal_offload_active = False
 524            self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic = None
 525            self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = 0.0
 526            return "thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error"
 527
 528        self._thermal_offload_active = False
 529        self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic = None
 530        self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = 0.0
 531        logging.warning(
 532            "[ThermalOffload] %s resumed GPU training after %.1fs at %.1fC",
 533            context,
 534            elapsed_s,
 535            temp_c,
 536        )
 537        return f"thermal_onload_gpu_{int(round(elapsed_s))}s"
 538
 539    def _handle_critical_thermal_offload(self, epoch: int, batch_idx: int, temp_c: float) -> str:
 540        if not bool(self.training_config.switch_on_thermal):
 541            return "none"
 542        if self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error:
 543            return "thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error"
 544        if self._thermal_offload_active:
 545            return self._monitor_thermal_offload_and_maybe_reload(epoch, batch_idx)
 546
 547        context = f"mlm epoch={epoch + 1} batch={batch_idx + 1}"
 548        checkpoint_path: Optional[str] = None
 549        logging.warning(
 550            "[ThermalOffload] %s critical threshold reached at %.1fC; switching to CPU training mode",
 551            context,
 552            temp_c,
 553        )
 554        try:
 555            checkpoint_path = self._save_thermal_emergency_checkpoint(epoch, batch_idx, temp_c)
 556        except Exception as exc:
 557            logging.exception(
 558                "[ThermalOffload] %s failed to save emergency checkpoint before offload: %s",
 559                context,
 560                exc,
 561            )
 562
 563        self._offload_training_state_to_cpu()
 564        self._thermal_offload_active = True
 565        self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic = time.perf_counter()
 566        self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = 0.0
 567        self._thermal_emergency_last_checkpoint = checkpoint_path
 568        self._last_guard_temp_c = float(temp_c)
 569        return "thermal_offload_cpu_mode"
 570
 571    def _enforce_thermal_guard(self, epoch: int, batch_idx: int) -> str:
 572        if not self.gpu_temp_guard.is_active:
 573            self._last_guard_temp_c = None
 574            return "none"
 575        if self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error:
 576            return "thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error"
 577        if self._thermal_offload_active:
 578            return self._monitor_thermal_offload_and_maybe_reload(epoch, batch_idx)
 579
 580        if not bool(self.training_config.switch_on_thermal):
 581            context = f"mlm epoch={epoch + 1} batch={batch_idx + 1}"
 582            temp_c = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.read_temperature_c())
 583            self._last_guard_temp_c = temp_c
 584            if temp_c > float(self.gpu_temp_guard.pause_threshold_c):
 585                result = self.gpu_temp_guard.wait_until_safe(context=context)
 586                self._last_guard_temp_c = result.temp_c
 587                return result.repair_action
 588            return "none"
 589
 590        context = f"mlm epoch={epoch + 1} batch={batch_idx + 1}"
 591        temp_c = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.read_temperature_c())
 592        self._last_guard_temp_c = temp_c
 593
 594        critical_threshold = self.gpu_temp_guard.critical_threshold_c
 595        if critical_threshold is not None and temp_c >= float(critical_threshold):
 596            return self._handle_critical_thermal_offload(epoch, batch_idx, temp_c)
 597
 598        if temp_c > float(self.gpu_temp_guard.pause_threshold_c):
 599            result = self.gpu_temp_guard.wait_until_safe(context=context)
 600            self._last_guard_temp_c = result.temp_c
 601            return result.repair_action
 602        return "none"
 603
 604    def _merge_guard_temperature(self, telemetry: Dict[str, float]) -> Dict[str, float]:
 605        merged = dict(telemetry)
 606        if self.gpu_temp_guard.is_active and self._last_guard_temp_c is not None:
 607            merged["gpu_temp_c"] = float(self._last_guard_temp_c)
 608        return merged
 609
 610    def _read_csv_header(self, csv_path: str) -> Optional[List[str]]:
 611        if not os.path.exists(csv_path) or os.path.getsize(csv_path) == 0:
 612            return None
 613        with open(csv_path, 'r', newline='', encoding='utf-8') as handle:
 614            reader = csv.reader(handle)
 615            return next(reader, None)
 616    
 617    def _init_csv_logger(self):
 618        """Initialize CSV file for metrics logging"""
 619        csv_path = self.training_config.csv_log_path
 620        csv_dir = os.path.dirname(csv_path)
 621        if csv_dir:
 622            os.makedirs(csv_dir, exist_ok=True)
 623
 624        file_exists = os.path.exists(csv_path)
 625        if file_exists:
 626            existing_header = self._read_csv_header(csv_path)
 627            if existing_header is not None and existing_header != self.csv_columns:
 628                if self.training_config.csv_rotate_on_schema_change:
 629                    base, ext = os.path.splitext(csv_path)
 630                    if not ext:
 631                        ext = ".csv"
 632                    rotated_path = f"{base}.{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}{ext}"
 633                    os.replace(csv_path, rotated_path)
 634                    logging.info(
 635                        f"CSV schema changed. Rotated previous log to: {rotated_path}"
 636                    )
 637                    file_exists = False
 638                else:
 639                    raise RuntimeError(
 640                        "CSV schema mismatch for existing metrics file. "
 641                        "Enable csv_rotate_on_schema_change or remove the old CSV."
 642                    )
 643
 644        self.csv_file = open(csv_path, 'a', newline='', encoding='utf-8')
 645        self.csv_writer = csv.writer(self.csv_file)
 646
 647        # Write header for new or empty file
 648        should_write_header = (not file_exists) or os.path.getsize(csv_path) == 0
 649        if should_write_header:
 650            self.csv_writer.writerow(self.csv_columns)
 651            self.csv_file.flush()
 652
 653    def _get_gpu_telemetry(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 654        """Collect GPU telemetry with best-effort NVML fallback."""
 655        telemetry = self._get_default_gpu_telemetry()
 656        if not torch.cuda.is_available():
 657            return telemetry
 658
 659        backend = str(self.training_config.gpu_metrics_backend).strip().lower()
 660        if backend == "none":
 661            return telemetry
 662        if backend != "nvml":
 663            return telemetry
 664        if self._nvml_disabled:
 665            return self._get_gpu_telemetry_from_nvidia_smi()
 666
 667        if self._nvml_module is None or self._nvml_handle is None:
 668            try:
 669                import pynvml  # type: ignore
 670
 671                pynvml.nvmlInit()
 672                idx = int(self.training_config.nvml_device_index)
 673                self._nvml_handle = pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetHandleByIndex(idx)
 674                self._nvml_module = pynvml
 675            except Exception as exc:
 676                self._nvml_disabled = True
 677                if not self._nvml_warning_logged:
 678                    logging.warning(f"NVML telemetry unavailable, falling back to nvidia-smi: {exc}")
 679                    self._nvml_warning_logged = True
 680                return self._get_gpu_telemetry_from_nvidia_smi()
 681
 682        try:
 683            pynvml = self._nvml_module
 684            handle = self._nvml_handle
 685            utilization = pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetUtilizationRates(handle)
 686            memory_info = pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetMemoryInfo(handle)
 687            telemetry["gpu_temp_c"] = float(
 688                pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetTemperature(handle, pynvml.NVML_TEMPERATURE_GPU)
 689            )
 690            telemetry["gpu_power_w"] = float(pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetPowerUsage(handle)) / 1000.0
 691            telemetry["gpu_util_pct"] = float(utilization.gpu)
 692            telemetry["gpu_mem_used_mib"] = float(memory_info.used) / (1024.0 ** 2)
 693        except Exception as exc:
 694            if not self._nvml_warning_logged:
 695                logging.warning(f"Failed reading NVML telemetry, falling back to nvidia-smi: {exc}")
 696                self._nvml_warning_logged = True
 697            return self._get_gpu_telemetry_from_nvidia_smi()
 698        return telemetry
 699
 700    def _parse_smi_value(self, raw: str) -> float:
 701        value = raw.strip()
 702        if not value or value.lower() in {"n/a", "[not supported]"}:
 703            return 0.0
 704        match = re.search(r"[-+]?\d*\.?\d+", value)
 705        if match is None:
 706            return 0.0
 707        try:
 708            return float(match.group(0))
 709        except ValueError:
 710            return 0.0
 711
 712    def _get_gpu_telemetry_from_nvidia_smi(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 713        telemetry = self._get_default_gpu_telemetry()
 714        cmd = [
 715            "nvidia-smi",
 716            "--query-gpu=temperature.gpu,power.draw,utilization.gpu,memory.used",
 717            "--format=csv,noheader,nounits",
 718            "-i",
 719            str(int(self.training_config.nvml_device_index)),
 720        ]
 721        try:
 722            result = subprocess.run(
 723                cmd,
 724                check=True,
 725                capture_output=True,
 726                text=True,
 727                timeout=2.0,
 728            )
 729            line = result.stdout.strip().splitlines()[0]
 730            parts = [p.strip() for p in line.split(",")]
 731            if len(parts) >= 4:
 732                telemetry["gpu_temp_c"] = self._parse_smi_value(parts[0])
 733                telemetry["gpu_power_w"] = self._parse_smi_value(parts[1])
 734                telemetry["gpu_util_pct"] = self._parse_smi_value(parts[2])
 735                telemetry["gpu_mem_used_mib"] = self._parse_smi_value(parts[3])
 736        except Exception:
 737            # Best-effort fallback: keep zeros if nvidia-smi is unavailable/unreadable.
 738            pass
 739        return telemetry
 740
 741    def _bucket_for_param_name(self, param_name: str) -> str:
 742        name = param_name.lower()
 743        if "router" in name:
 744            return "router"
 745        if "experts" in name:
 746            return "experts"
 747        if "embed" in name or ".emb." in name or "factorized_embedding" in name:
 748            return "embeddings"
 749        if "ode" in name:
 750            return "ode"
 751        if "retnet" in name or "retention" in name:
 752            return "retnet"
 753        if "mamba" in name:
 754            return "mamba"
 755        if "ffn" in name:
 756            return "ffn"
 757        if "norm" in name:
 758            return "norms"
 759        if name.startswith("head") or ".head." in name:
 760            return "head"
 761        if (
 762            "attn" in name
 763            or "attention" in name
 764            or "q_proj" in name
 765            or "k_proj" in name
 766            or "v_proj" in name
 767            or "out_proj" in name
 768        ):
 769            return "attention"
 770        return "other"
 771
 772    def _collect_block_grad_norms(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 773        """Collect L2 gradient norms by fixed logical component buckets."""
 774        bucket_sq_sums = {k: 0.0 for k in self._get_default_block_grad_norms().keys()}
 775        if not self.training_config.enable_block_grad_norms:
 776            return self._get_default_block_grad_norms()
 777
 778        for name, param in self.model.named_parameters():
 779            if param.grad is None:
 780                continue
 781            grad = param.grad.detach()
 782            bucket = self._bucket_for_param_name(name)
 783            bucket_sq_sums[bucket] += float((grad.float().pow(2).sum()).item())
 784
 785        return {key: math.sqrt(max(val, 0.0)) for key, val in bucket_sq_sums.items()}
 786    
 787    def _log_step_to_csv(self, epoch: int, step: int, loss: float, accuracy: float,
 788                         lr: float, grad_norm: float = 0.0,
 789                         has_nan: bool = False, has_inf: bool = False,
 790                         has_zero: bool = False, repair_action: str = "none",
 791                         gpu_telemetry: Optional[Dict[str, float]] = None,
 792                         block_grad_norms: Optional[Dict[str, float]] = None,
 793                         step_time_ms: float = 0.0, tokens_per_sec: float = 0.0,
 794                         clip_ratio: float = 0.0, effective_batch_size: int = 0):
 795        """Log a single training step to CSV"""
 796        gpu_memory = 0.0
 797        gpu_cached = 0.0
 798        if torch.cuda.is_available():
 799            gpu_memory = torch.cuda.memory_allocated() / 1024**3
 800            gpu_cached = torch.cuda.memory_reserved() / 1024**3
 801
 802        telemetry = gpu_telemetry or self._get_default_gpu_telemetry()
 803        grad_buckets = block_grad_norms or self._get_default_block_grad_norms()
 804        
 805        self.csv_writer.writerow([
 806            datetime.now().isoformat(),
 807            epoch,
 808            step,
 809            self.global_step,
 810            f'{loss:.6f}',
 811            f'{accuracy:.6f}',
 812            f'{lr:.8e}',
 813            f'{grad_norm:.6f}',
 814            f'{self.scaler.get_scale():.2f}',
 815            f'{gpu_memory:.4f}',
 816            f'{gpu_cached:.4f}',
 817            int(has_nan),
 818            int(has_inf),
 819            int(has_zero),
 820            repair_action,
 821            f"{float(telemetry['gpu_temp_c']):.2f}",
 822            f"{float(telemetry['gpu_power_w']):.2f}",
 823            f"{float(telemetry['gpu_util_pct']):.2f}",
 824            f"{float(telemetry['gpu_mem_used_mib']):.2f}",
 825            f"{float(grad_buckets['embeddings']):.6f}",
 826            f"{float(grad_buckets['attention']):.6f}",
 827            f"{float(grad_buckets['ffn']):.6f}",
 828            f"{float(grad_buckets['experts']):.6f}",
 829            f"{float(grad_buckets['router']):.6f}",
 830            f"{float(grad_buckets['ode']):.6f}",
 831            f"{float(grad_buckets['retnet']):.6f}",
 832            f"{float(grad_buckets['mamba']):.6f}",
 833            f"{float(grad_buckets['norms']):.6f}",
 834            f"{float(grad_buckets['head']):.6f}",
 835            f"{float(grad_buckets['other']):.6f}",
 836            f"{float(step_time_ms):.2f}",
 837            f"{float(tokens_per_sec):.2f}",
 838            f"{float(clip_ratio):.6f}",
 839            int(effective_batch_size),
 840        ])
 841        self.csv_file.flush()
 842    
 843    def _check_for_nan(self, loss: torch.Tensor, step: int, batch: dict) -> bool:
 844        """Check if loss is NaN and log debug information if detected"""
 845        if not torch.isnan(loss) and not torch.isinf(loss):
 846            # Save last valid state for debugging
 847            if step % 50 == 0:  # Don't save every step for memory efficiency
 848                self.last_valid_state = {
 849                    'step': step,
 850                    'loss': loss.item(),
 851                    'scaler_scale': self.scaler.get_scale()
 852                }
 853            return False
 854        
 855        # NaN detected! Log comprehensive debug information
 856        self.nan_detected = True
 857        logging.error("=" * 80)
 858        logging.error("🚨 NaN/Inf DETECTED IN LOSS - STOPPING TRAINING 🚨")
 859        logging.error("=" * 80)
 860        
 861        logging.error(f"Step: {self.global_step}, Batch index: {step}")
 862        logging.error(f"Loss value: {loss.item()}")
 863        logging.error(f"Scaler scale: {self.scaler.get_scale()}")
 864        
 865        # Log last valid state
 866        if self.last_valid_state:
 867            logging.error(f"Last valid state: step={self.last_valid_state['step']}, "
 868                         f"loss={self.last_valid_state['loss']:.6f}, "
 869                         f"scale={self.last_valid_state['scaler_scale']}")
 870        
 871        # Log learning rates for each param group
 872        logging.error("Learning rates by parameter group:")
 873        for i, group in enumerate(self.optimizer.param_groups):
 874            name = group.get('name', f'group_{i}')
 875            logging.error(f"  {name}: lr={group['lr']:.8e}")
 876        
 877        # Check gradients
 878        logging.error("Gradient statistics by parameter:")
 879        nan_params = []
 880        inf_params = []
 881        large_grad_params = []
 882        
 883        for name, param in self.model.named_parameters():
 884            if param.grad is not None:
 885                grad = param.grad
 886                if torch.isnan(grad).any():
 887                    nan_params.append(name)
 888                elif torch.isinf(grad).any():
 889                    inf_params.append(name)
 890                else:
 891                    grad_max = grad.abs().max().item()
 892                    if grad_max > 1000:
 893                        large_grad_params.append((name, grad_max))
 894        
 895        if nan_params:
 896            logging.error(f"Parameters with NaN gradients ({len(nan_params)}):")
 897            for p in nan_params[:10]:  # Limit output
 898                logging.error(f"  - {p}")
 899        
 900        if inf_params:
 901            logging.error(f"Parameters with Inf gradients ({len(inf_params)}):")
 902            for p in inf_params[:10]:
 903                logging.error(f"  - {p}")
 904        
 905        if large_grad_params:
 906            logging.error(f"Parameters with large gradients (>1000) ({len(large_grad_params)}):")
 907            for name, val in sorted(large_grad_params, key=lambda x: -x[1])[:10]:
 908                logging.error(f"  - {name}: {val:.2f}")
 909        
 910        # Check model weights
 911        logging.error("Model weight statistics:")
 912        for name, param in self.model.named_parameters():
 913            if torch.isnan(param).any():
 914                logging.error(f"  NaN weights in: {name}")
 915            elif torch.isinf(param).any():
 916                logging.error(f"  Inf weights in: {name}")
 917        
 918        # Log input batch statistics
 919        logging.error("Input batch statistics:")
 920        for key, val in batch.items():
 921            if isinstance(val, torch.Tensor):
 922                logging.error(f"  {key}: shape={val.shape}, dtype={val.dtype}, "
 923                            f"min={val.min().item()}, max={val.max().item()}")
 924        
 925        # GPU memory state
 926        if torch.cuda.is_available():
 927            logging.error(f"GPU Memory - Allocated: {torch.cuda.memory_allocated()/1024**3:.2f}GB, "
 928                         f"Cached: {torch.cuda.memory_reserved()/1024**3:.2f}GB")
 929        
 930        # Log config that might affect stability
 931        logging.error("Model configuration (stability-relevant):")
 932        logging.error(f"  - BitNet enabled: {getattr(self.config, 'use_bitnet', 'n/a')}")
 933        logging.error(
 934            "  - ODE solver: %s, steps: %s",
 935            getattr(self.config, "ode_solver", "n/a"),
 936            getattr(self.config, "ode_steps", "n/a"),
 937        )
 938        logging.error(f"  - Layer pattern: {getattr(self.config, 'layer_pattern', 'n/a')}")
 939        logging.error(f"  - Num loops: {getattr(self.config, 'num_loops', 'n/a')}")
 940        logging.error(f"  - Dropout: {getattr(self.config, 'dropout', 'n/a')}")
 941        
 942        logging.error("=" * 80)
 943        
 944        return True
 945
 946    def _inspect_gradients(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 947        """Inspect gradients right after backward for NaN/Inf/zero and global norm validity."""
 948        has_nan = False
 949        has_inf = False
 950        has_zero = False
 951        total_norm = 0.0
 952
 953        for param in self.model.parameters():
 954            if param.grad is None:
 955                continue
 956
 957            grad = param.grad
 958            if torch.isnan(grad).any():
 959                has_nan = True
 960            if torch.isinf(grad).any():
 961                has_inf = True
 962            if (grad == 0).all():
 963                has_zero = True
 964
 965            grad_norm = grad.norm().item()
 966            total_norm += grad_norm
 967
 968        if not torch.isfinite(torch.tensor(total_norm, device=self.device)):
 969            has_inf = True
 970
 971        if total_norm < self.training_config.min_grad_norm_for_signal:
 972            has_zero = True
 973
 974        return {
 975            "has_nan": has_nan,
 976            "has_inf": has_inf,
 977            "has_zero": has_zero,
 978            "total_norm": float(total_norm),
 979        }
 980
 981    def _apply_galore_projection(self):
 982        """Apply low-rank projection to gradients (GaLore-style) if enabled."""
 983        if not self.training_config.use_galore:
 984            return
 985        if self.global_step % max(int(self.training_config.galore_update_interval), 1) != 0:
 986            return
 987
 988        rank = max(int(self.training_config.galore_rank), 1)
 989        max_dim = int(self.training_config.galore_max_dim)
 990        scale = float(self.training_config.galore_scale)
 991
 992        for name, param in self.model.named_parameters():
 993            if param.grad is None:
 994                continue
 995            if param.grad.dim() != 2:
 996                continue
 997            if "bias" in name.lower() or "embed" in name.lower():
 998                continue
 999
1000            grad = param.grad
1001            rows, cols = grad.shape
1002            if min(rows, cols) < rank:
1003                continue
1004            if max(rows, cols) > max_dim:
1005                continue
1006
1007            try:
1008                u, s, vh = torch.linalg.svd(grad.float(), full_matrices=False)
1009            except RuntimeError:
1010                continue
1011
1012            u = u[:, :rank]
1013            s = s[:rank]
1014            vh = vh[:rank, :]
1015            approx = (u * s) @ vh
1016            grad.copy_(approx.to(dtype=grad.dtype) * scale)
1017
1018    def _scale_learning_rate(self, factor: float):
1019        """Scale all optimizer param-group learning rates by a multiplicative factor."""
1020        for group in self.optimizer.param_groups:
1021            group['lr'] = max(group['lr'] * factor, 1e-9)  # Lower floor to allow more aggressive reduction
1022    
1023    def _setup_optimizer(self) -> optim.Optimizer:
1024        """Setup optimizer with parameter groups for different components"""
1025        # Separate parameters by component type
1026        ode_params = []
1027        retnet_params = []
1028        mamba_params = []
1029        titan_attn_params = []
1030        norm_params = []
1031        embed_params = []
1032        other_params = []
1033        
1034        for name, param in self.model.named_parameters():
1035            if not param.requires_grad:
1036                continue
1037                
1038            if 'ode' in name.lower():
1039                ode_params.append(param)
1040            elif 'retention' in name.lower() or 'retnet' in name.lower():
1041                retnet_params.append(param)
1042            elif 'mamba' in name.lower():
1043                mamba_params.append(param)
1044            elif 'titan_attn' in name.lower() or 'attention' in name.lower():
1045                titan_attn_params.append(param)
1046            elif 'norm' in name.lower() or 'layer_norm' in name.lower():
1047                norm_params.append(param)
1048            elif 'embed' in name.lower():
1049                embed_params.append(param)
1050            else:
1051                other_params.append(param)
1052        
1053        param_groups = [
1054            {
1055                'params': embed_params,
1056                'lr': 1e-6,
1057                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1058                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1059                'eps': 1e-8,
1060                'name': 'embeddings'
1061            },
1062            {
1063                'params': norm_params,
1064                'lr': 5e-6,
1065                'weight_decay': 0.001,
1066                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1067                'eps': 1e-8,
1068                'name': 'norms'
1069            },
1070            {
1071                'params': ode_params,
1072                'lr': 1e-7,
1073                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1074                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1075                'eps': 1e-8,
1076                'name': 'ode'
1077            },
1078            {
1079                'params': retnet_params,
1080                'lr': 5e-6,
1081                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1082                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1083                'eps': 1e-8,
1084                'name': 'retnet'
1085            },
1086            {
1087                'params': mamba_params,
1088                'lr': 2e-6,
1089                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1090                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1091                'eps': 1e-8,
1092                'name': 'mamba'
1093            },
1094            {
1095                'params': titan_attn_params,
1096                'lr': 3e-6,
1097                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1098                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1099                'eps': 1e-8,
1100                'name': 'attention'
1101            },
1102            {
1103                'params': other_params,
1104                'lr': 2e-6,
1105                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1106                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1107                'eps': 1e-8,
1108                'name': 'other'
1109            }
1110        ]
1111        
1112        # Filter out empty groups
1113        param_groups = [group for group in param_groups if group['params']]
1114        
1115        # Log parameter distribution
1116        for group in param_groups:
1117            param_count = sum(p.numel() for p in group['params'])
1118            logging.info(f"Parameter group '{group['name']}': {param_count:,} parameters, lr={group['lr']}")
1119        
1120        optimizer = build_optimizer(
1121            optimizer_class=self.training_config.optimizer_class,
1122            param_groups=param_groups,
1123            parameters=self.training_config.optimizer_parameters,
1124        )
1125        logging.info(f"Using optimizer: {self.training_config.optimizer_class}")
1126        return optimizer
1127    
1128    def _setup_scheduler(self):
1129        """Setup learning rate scheduler with warmup"""
1130        total_steps = int(self.training_config.scheduler_total_steps)
1131        if total_steps <= 0:
1132            total_steps = 10000  # Estimated total steps
1133        warmup_ratio = float(self.training_config.scheduler_warmup_ratio)
1134        warmup_ratio = min(max(warmup_ratio, 0.0), 1.0)
1135        warmup_steps = int(warmup_ratio * total_steps)
1136        
1137        scheduler_type = str(self.training_config.scheduler_type).strip().lower()
1138
1139        def lr_lambda(step):
1140            if scheduler_type == "constant":
1141                return 1.0
1142            if scheduler_type == "linear_warmup_then_constant":
1143                if warmup_steps == 0:
1144                    return 1.0
1145                if step < warmup_steps:
1146                    return (step + 1) / warmup_steps
1147                return 1.0
1148            # cosine (default)
1149            if warmup_steps == 0:
1150                progress = step / max(total_steps, 1)
1151                progress = min(max(progress, 0.0), 1.0)
1152                return 0.5 * (1 + math.cos(math.pi * progress))
1153            if step < warmup_steps:
1154                return (step + 1) / warmup_steps
1155            progress = (step - warmup_steps) / max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1)
1156            progress = min(max(progress, 0.0), 1.0)
1157            return 0.5 * (1 + math.cos(math.pi * progress))
1158        
1159        return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(self.optimizer, lr_lambda)
1160    
1161    def _log_setup(self):
1162        """Log training setup information"""
1163        logging.info(f"🎯 Training on device: {self.device}")
1164        
1165        if torch.cuda.is_available():
1166            gpu_name = torch.cuda.get_device_name(0)
1167            gpu_memory = torch.cuda.get_device_properties(0).total_memory / 1e9
1168            logging.info(f"🔥 GPU: {gpu_name}")
1169            logging.info(f"💾 GPU Memory: {gpu_memory:.2f}GB")
1170            
1171            # Enable optimizations for P40
1172            torch.backends.cudnn.benchmark = True
1173            torch.backends.cudnn.allow_tf32 = True
1174        
1175        # Model-specific logging
1176        logging.info("🧠 Architecture: %s", self.model.__class__.__name__)
1177        logging.info(f"⚡ BitNet Quantization: {getattr(self.config, 'use_bitnet', 'n/a')}")
1178        logging.info(
1179            "🌊 ODE Solver: %s (%s steps)",
1180            getattr(self.config, "ode_solver", "n/a"),
1181            getattr(self.config, "ode_steps", "n/a"),
1182        )
1183        logging.info(f"🔄 Recursion Loops: {getattr(self.config, 'num_loops', 'n/a')}")
1184        logging.info(f"📐 Gradient Accumulation: {self.gradient_accumulation_steps} steps")
1185        if self.gpu_temp_guard.is_active:
1186            logging.info(
1187                "🌡️ GPU thermal guard enabled (pause>%.1fC, resume<=%.1fC, poll=%.1fs, critical=%s)",
1188                float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c),
1189                float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c),
1190                float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds),
1191                (
1192                    f"{float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c):.1f}C"
1193                    if self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c is not None
1194                    else "disabled"
1195                ),
1196            )
1197            if self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c is not None:
1198                logging.info(
1199                    "🌡️ Thermal critical offload enabled (critical>=%.1fC)",
1200                    float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c),
1201                )
1202            else:
1203                logging.info(
1204                    "🌡️ Thermal critical offload disabled (gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c is not set)"
1205                )
1206            logging.info(
1207                "🌡️ switch_on_thermal=%s",
1208                bool(self.training_config.switch_on_thermal),
1209            )
1210        else:
1211            logging.info("🌡️ GPU thermal guard disabled")
1212
1213    def _forward_mlm_logits(self, input_ids: torch.Tensor, attention_mask: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
1214        """Forward pass compatible with custom models and HF masked-LM outputs."""
1215        try:
1216            outputs = self.model(input_ids=input_ids, attention_mask=attention_mask)
1217        except TypeError:
1218            try:
1219                outputs = self.model(input_ids, attention_mask=attention_mask)
1220            except TypeError:
1221                outputs = self.model(input_ids)
1222
1223        if torch.is_tensor(outputs):
1224            return outputs
1225        if isinstance(outputs, dict):
1226            logits = outputs.get("logits")
1227            if logits is not None:
1228                return logits
1229        if hasattr(outputs, "logits"):
1230            return outputs.logits
1231
1232        raise RuntimeError(
1233            "Model forward output does not include MLM logits. "
1234            "Expected tensor, dict['logits'], or object.logits."
1235        )
1236    
1237    def compute_mlm_loss(self, input_ids, attention_mask, labels):
1238        """Compute masked language modeling loss with shape safety checks.
1239
1240        Handles both HF-style labels (``-100`` on unmasked tokens) and
1241        raw-sequence labels (infers masked positions by comparing input
1242        and label token IDs). Includes a fallback that forces at least one
1243        valid supervised token when no MLM targets exist.
1244
1245        Args:
1246            input_ids: Token ID tensor of shape ``(B, S)``.
1247            attention_mask: Attention mask tensor of shape ``(B, S)``.
1248            labels: Label tensor of shape ``(B, S)``.
1249
1250        Returns:
1251            Tuple of ``(loss, accuracy)`` where ``loss`` is a scalar tensor
1252            and ``accuracy`` is a scalar tensor in ``[0, 1]``.
1253
1254        Raises:
1255            RuntimeError: If non-finite logits are detected, or if tensor
1256                shapes are mismatched.
1257        """
1258        # Forward pass
1259        logits = self._forward_mlm_logits(input_ids, attention_mask)
1260        auxiliary_losses = getattr(self.model, "last_auxiliary_losses", None)
1261
1262        # Safety: avoid propagating non-finite logits into CE (would yield NaN loss)
1263        if not torch.isfinite(logits).all():
1264            bad = (~torch.isfinite(logits)).sum().item()
1265            raise RuntimeError(f"Non-finite logits detected in forward pass: {bad} elements")
1266        
1267        # Reshape for loss computation
1268        batch_size, seq_len, vocab_size = logits.shape
1269        
1270        # CRITICAL: Ensure all tensors have matching shapes before flattening
1271        # Variable sequence lengths can cause shape mismatches
1272        if labels.shape != input_ids.shape:
1273            raise RuntimeError(f"Shape mismatch: labels {labels.shape} != input_ids {input_ids.shape}")
1274        if attention_mask.shape != input_ids.shape:
1275            raise RuntimeError(f"Shape mismatch: attention_mask {attention_mask.shape} != input_ids {input_ids.shape}")
1276        
1277        logits = logits.view(-1, vocab_size)
1278        labels = labels.view(-1)
1279        input_flat = input_ids.view(-1)
1280        attn_flat = attention_mask.view(-1)
1281        
1282        # Support both label conventions:
1283        # 1) labels already contain -100 on unmasked tokens (HF-style)
1284        # 2) labels contain full original sequence; infer masked positions by input!=label
1285        if (labels == -100).any():
1286            mlm_labels = labels.clone()
1287        else:
1288            mlm_labels = labels.clone()
1289            mlm_labels[labels == input_flat] = -100
1290
1291        valid_mask = (mlm_labels != -100)
1292
1293        # Rare fallback: if no valid MLM targets exist, force one valid supervised token
1294        # from attended positions to keep CE finite and training alive.
1295        if valid_mask.sum().item() == 0:
1296            candidate_positions = torch.nonzero(attn_flat > 0, as_tuple=False)
1297            if candidate_positions.numel() > 0:
1298                first_idx = int(candidate_positions[0].item())
1299                mlm_labels[first_idx] = labels[first_idx]
1300                valid_mask = (mlm_labels != -100)
1301
1302        # Compute CE in float32 for numerical stability
1303        if valid_mask.sum().item() > 0:
1304            loss = F.cross_entropy(logits[valid_mask].float(), mlm_labels[valid_mask])
1305        else:
1306            # Defensive fallback (should almost never happen after forced target above)
1307            loss = logits.new_zeros((), requires_grad=True)
1308
1309        if isinstance(auxiliary_losses, dict):
1310            for aux_name, aux_loss in auxiliary_losses.items():
1311                if torch.is_tensor(aux_loss) and aux_loss.requires_grad:
1312                    if not torch.isfinite(aux_loss):
1313                        raise RuntimeError(
1314                            f"Non-finite auxiliary loss detected for {aux_name} during forward pass"
1315                        )
1316                    loss = loss + aux_loss
1317        
1318        # Compute accuracy on masked tokens
1319        with torch.no_grad():
1320            mask = valid_mask
1321            if mask.any():
1322                predictions = logits.argmax(dim=-1)
1323                correct = (predictions == mlm_labels) & mask
1324                accuracy = correct.sum().float() / mask.sum().float()
1325            else:
1326                accuracy = torch.tensor(0.0, device=logits.device)
1327        
1328        return loss, accuracy
1329    
1330    def train_epoch(self, dataloader: DataLoader, epoch: int) -> Tuple[float, bool]:
1331        """
1332        Train for one epoch with advanced monitoring.
1333        
1334        Returns:
1335            Tuple[float, bool]: (average_loss, should_stop)
1336            should_stop is True if NaN was detected
1337        """
1338        self.model.train()
1339        total_loss = 0.0
1340        total_accuracy = 0.0
1341        num_batches = 0
1342        grad_norm = 0.0
1343        self.current_epoch_had_inf = False
1344        current_epoch_had_zero = False
1345        
1346        # Progress bar with detailed metrics
1347        progress_bar = tqdm(
1348            dataloader, 
1349            desc=f"🚀 Epoch {epoch+1}",
1350            leave=True,
1351            ncols=120
1352        )
1353        epoch_started = time.perf_counter()
1354        
1355        self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1356        optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1357        
1358        for batch_idx, batch in enumerate(progress_bar):
1359            try:
1360                thermal_action = self._enforce_thermal_guard(epoch, batch_idx)
1361                if thermal_action != "none":
1362                    self._pending_thermal_repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1363                        self._pending_thermal_repair_action,
1364                        thermal_action,
1365                    )
1366                # Move to device
1367                batch = {k: v.to(self.device, non_blocking=True) for k, v in batch.items()}
1368                repair_action = self._pending_thermal_repair_action
1369                retry_count = 0
1370                batch_done = False
1371                amp_enabled = self.use_amp and str(self.device).startswith("cuda")
1372
1373                while retry_count <= self.training_config.max_nan_retries and not batch_done:
1374                    # Forward pass (AMP if enabled)
1375                    with autocast(self.device, enabled=amp_enabled, dtype=self.amp_dtype):
1376                        loss, accuracy = self.compute_mlm_loss(
1377                            batch['input_ids'],
1378                            batch['attention_mask'],
1379                            batch['labels']
1380                        )
1381
1382                        if self._check_for_nan(loss * self.gradient_accumulation_steps, batch_idx, batch):
1383                            repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1384                                repair_action,
1385                                f"nan_loss_retry_{retry_count + 1}",
1386                            )
1387                            self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1388                            self._scale_learning_rate(0.5)
1389                            retry_count += 1
1390
1391                            if retry_count > self.training_config.max_nan_retries:
1392                                try:
1393                                    emergency_path = self.save_checkpoint(epoch, suffix="_nan_emergency")
1394                                    logging.error(f"Emergency checkpoint saved: {emergency_path}")
1395                                except Exception as e:
1396                                    logging.error(f"Failed to save emergency checkpoint: {e}")
1397                                return total_loss / max(num_batches, 1), True
1398                            continue
1399
1400                        raw_loss = loss.item()
1401                        scaled_loss = loss / self.gradient_accumulation_steps
1402
1403                    # Backward pass
1404                    if amp_enabled:
1405                        self.scaler.scale(scaled_loss).backward()
1406                    else:
1407                        scaled_loss.backward()
1408
1409                    grad_stats = self._inspect_gradients()
1410                    current_epoch_had_zero = current_epoch_had_zero or grad_stats["has_zero"]
1411
1412                    # Repair policy for NaN gradients: skip step, zero grad, LR*0.75 retry up to N times
1413                    if grad_stats["has_nan"]:
1414                        repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1415                            repair_action,
1416                            f"nan_grad_retry_{retry_count + 1}",
1417                        )
1418                        self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1419                        self._scale_learning_rate(0.75)  # Less aggressive reduction (was 0.5)
1420                        retry_count += 1
1421
1422                        if retry_count > self.training_config.max_nan_retries:
1423                            logging.error(
1424                                "NaN gradients persisted after retries. Saving checkpoint and stopping training."
1425                            )
1426                            try:
1427                                emergency_path = self.save_checkpoint(epoch, suffix="_nan_grad_emergency")
1428                                logging.error(f"Emergency checkpoint saved: {emergency_path}")
1429                            except Exception as e:
1430                                logging.error(f"Failed to save emergency checkpoint: {e}")
1431                            return total_loss / max(num_batches, 1), True
1432                        continue
1433
1434                    # Update every gradient_accumulation_steps
1435                    if (batch_idx + 1) % self.gradient_accumulation_steps == 0:
1436                        if amp_enabled:
1437                            self.scaler.unscale_(self.optimizer)
1438
1439                        self._apply_galore_projection()
1440
1441                        grad_norm = clip_grad_norm_(
1442                            self.model.parameters(),
1443                            max_norm=self.training_config.grad_clip_max_norm
1444                        )
1445                        grad_norm_value = grad_norm.item() if isinstance(grad_norm, torch.Tensor) else float(grad_norm)
1446                        clip_ratio = grad_norm_value / max(float(self.training_config.grad_clip_max_norm), 1e-12)
1447
1448                        telemetry_interval = max(int(self.training_config.telemetry_log_interval), 1)
1449                        should_log_heavy = ((self.global_step + 1) % telemetry_interval == 0)
1450                        gpu_telemetry = (
1451                            self._get_gpu_telemetry()
1452                            if should_log_heavy
1453                            else self._get_default_gpu_telemetry()
1454                        )
1455                        gpu_telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(gpu_telemetry)
1456                        block_grad_norms = (
1457                            self._collect_block_grad_norms()
1458                            if should_log_heavy
1459                            else self._get_default_block_grad_norms()
1460                        )
1461                        step_time_ms = (time.perf_counter() - optimizer_window_start) * 1000.0
1462                        effective_batch_size = int(batch['input_ids'].shape[0]) * self.gradient_accumulation_steps
1463                        token_count = effective_batch_size * int(batch['input_ids'].shape[1])
1464                        tokens_per_sec = float(token_count) / max(step_time_ms / 1000.0, 1e-9)
1465
1466                        post_clip_bad = (not math.isfinite(grad_norm_value)) or (
1467                            grad_norm_value > self.training_config.inf_post_clip_threshold
1468                        )
1469
1470                        # Repair policy for Inf/exploding gradients
1471                        if grad_stats["has_inf"] or post_clip_bad:
1472                            self.current_epoch_had_inf = True
1473                            repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1474                                repair_action,
1475                                "inf_skip_step_lr_half",
1476                            )
1477                            self._scale_learning_rate(0.5)
1478
1479                            self.global_step += 1
1480                            current_lr = self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]
1481                            self._log_step_to_csv(
1482                                epoch=epoch,
1483                                step=batch_idx,
1484                                loss=raw_loss,
1485                                accuracy=accuracy.item(),
1486                                lr=current_lr,
1487                                grad_norm=grad_norm_value,
1488                                has_nan=grad_stats["has_nan"],
1489                                has_inf=True,
1490                                has_zero=grad_stats["has_zero"],
1491                                repair_action=repair_action,
1492                                gpu_telemetry=gpu_telemetry,
1493                                block_grad_norms=block_grad_norms,
1494                                step_time_ms=step_time_ms,
1495                                tokens_per_sec=tokens_per_sec,
1496                                clip_ratio=clip_ratio,
1497                                effective_batch_size=effective_batch_size,
1498                            )
1499                            self._pending_thermal_repair_action = "none"
1500                            self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1501                            optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1502                            batch_done = True
1503                            continue
1504
1505                        # Normal optimizer step
1506                        if amp_enabled:
1507                            self.scaler.step(self.optimizer)
1508                            self.scaler.update()
1509                        else:
1510                            self.optimizer.step()
1511
1512                        self.scheduler.step()
1513                        self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1514
1515                        self.global_step += 1
1516                        current_lr = self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]
1517                        self._log_step_to_csv(
1518                            epoch=epoch,
1519                            step=batch_idx,
1520                            loss=raw_loss,
1521                            accuracy=accuracy.item(),
1522                            lr=current_lr,
1523                            grad_norm=grad_norm_value,
1524                            has_nan=grad_stats["has_nan"],
1525                            has_inf=grad_stats["has_inf"],
1526                            has_zero=grad_stats["has_zero"],
1527                            repair_action=repair_action,
1528                            gpu_telemetry=gpu_telemetry,
1529                            block_grad_norms=block_grad_norms,
1530                            step_time_ms=step_time_ms,
1531                            tokens_per_sec=tokens_per_sec,
1532                            clip_ratio=clip_ratio,
1533                            effective_batch_size=effective_batch_size,
1534                        )
1535                        self._pending_thermal_repair_action = "none"
1536                        optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1537
1538                        if self.global_step % self.training_config.checkpoint_every_n_steps == 0:
1539                            self._save_rolling_checkpoint(epoch)
1540
1541                        self._maybe_save_best_checkpoint(epoch, raw_loss)
1542
1543                    # Accumulate metrics
1544                    total_loss += raw_loss
1545                    total_accuracy += accuracy.item()
1546                    num_batches += 1
1547                    batch_done = True
1548
1549                if not batch_done:
1550                    return total_loss / max(num_batches, 1), True
1551                
1552                # Update progress bar
1553                current_lr = self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]
1554                progress_bar.set_postfix({
1555                    'loss': f'{(total_loss / max(num_batches, 1)):.4f}',
1556                    'acc': f'{accuracy.item():.3f}',
1557                    'lr': f'{current_lr:.2e}',
1558                    'step': self.global_step
1559                })
1560                
1561                # Memory management every 50 steps
1562                if batch_idx % 50 == 0 and torch.cuda.is_available():
1563                    torch.cuda.empty_cache()
1564                
1565                # Detailed logging every 100 steps
1566                if batch_idx % 100 == 0 and batch_idx > 0:
1567                    avg_loss = total_loss / num_batches
1568                    avg_acc = total_accuracy / num_batches
1569                    progress_snapshot = tqdm.format_meter(
1570                        batch_idx + 1,
1571                        len(dataloader),
1572                        time.perf_counter() - epoch_started,
1573                    )
1574                    logging.info("Progress %s", progress_snapshot)
1575                    
1576                    if torch.cuda.is_available():
1577                        memory_used = torch.cuda.memory_allocated() / 1024**3
1578                        memory_cached = torch.cuda.memory_reserved() / 1024**3
1579                        logging.info(
1580                            f"Step {self.global_step}: Loss={avg_loss:.4f}, "
1581                            f"Acc={avg_acc:.3f}, GPU={memory_used:.2f}GB"
1582                        )
1583                
1584            except RuntimeError as e:
1585                if isinstance(e, GPUTelemetryError):
1586                    telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(self._get_default_gpu_telemetry())
1587                    self._log_step_to_csv(
1588                        epoch=epoch,
1589                        step=batch_idx,
1590                        loss=float("nan"),
1591                        accuracy=0.0,
1592                        lr=self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0],
1593                        grad_norm=0.0,
1594                        has_nan=False,
1595                        has_inf=True,
1596                        has_zero=False,
1597                        repair_action="telemetry_fatal_stop",
1598                        gpu_telemetry=telemetry,
1599                        block_grad_norms=self._get_default_block_grad_norms(),
1600                        step_time_ms=0.0,
1601                        tokens_per_sec=0.0,
1602                        clip_ratio=0.0,
1603                        effective_batch_size=0,
1604                    )
1605                    logging.error(
1606                        "Fatal GPU telemetry error at batch %s: %s. Stopping training immediately.",
1607                        batch_idx,
1608                        e,
1609                    )
1610                    raise
1611                if self._switch_to_cpu_only_after_gpu_error(exc=e, epoch=epoch, batch_idx=batch_idx):
1612                    telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(self._get_default_gpu_telemetry())
1613                    self._log_step_to_csv(
1614                        epoch=epoch,
1615                        step=batch_idx,
1616                        loss=float("nan"),
1617                        accuracy=0.0,
1618                        lr=self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0],
1619                        grad_norm=0.0,
1620                        has_nan=False,
1621                        has_inf=True,
1622                        has_zero=False,
1623                        repair_action="thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error",
1624                        gpu_telemetry=telemetry,
1625                        block_grad_norms=self._get_default_block_grad_norms(),
1626                        step_time_ms=0.0,
1627                        tokens_per_sec=0.0,
1628                        clip_ratio=0.0,
1629                        effective_batch_size=0,
1630                    )
1631                    self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1632                    self._pending_thermal_repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1633                        self._pending_thermal_repair_action,
1634                        "thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error",
1635                    )
1636                    optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1637                    continue
1638                if "out of memory" in str(e):
1639                    telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(self._get_default_gpu_telemetry())
1640                    self._log_step_to_csv(
1641                        epoch=epoch,
1642                        step=batch_idx,
1643                        loss=float("nan"),
1644                        accuracy=0.0,
1645                        lr=self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0],
1646                        grad_norm=0.0,
1647                        has_nan=False,
1648                        has_inf=False,
1649                        has_zero=False,
1650                        repair_action="oom_skip_batch",
1651                        gpu_telemetry=telemetry,
1652                        block_grad_norms=self._get_default_block_grad_norms(),
1653                        step_time_ms=0.0,
1654                        tokens_per_sec=0.0,
1655                        clip_ratio=0.0,
1656                        effective_batch_size=0,
1657                    )
1658                    logging.error(f"OOM at batch {batch_idx}, clearing cache and continuing...")
1659                    if torch.cuda.is_available():
1660                        torch.cuda.empty_cache()
1661                    self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1662                    continue
1663                else:
1664                    raise e
1665        
1666        # Final epoch metrics
1667        avg_loss = total_loss / max(num_batches, 1)
1668        avg_accuracy = total_accuracy / max(num_batches, 1)
1669        
1670        # Update best loss / plateau tracking
1671        if avg_loss < self.best_loss:
1672            self.best_loss = avg_loss
1673            self.non_improving_epochs = 0
1674            logging.info(f"🎉 New best loss: {self.best_loss:.4f}")
1675        else:
1676            self.non_improving_epochs += 1
1677
1678        if self.current_epoch_had_inf:
1679            self.consecutive_inf_epochs += 1
1680        else:
1681            self.consecutive_inf_epochs = 0
1682
