1683        if current_epoch_had_zero and self.non_improving_epochs >= self.training_config.zero_grad_plateau_patience:
1684            self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs += 1
1685        else:
1686            self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs = 0
1687        
1688        logging.info(
1689            f"📊 Epoch {epoch+1} Summary: "
1690            f"Loss={avg_loss:.4f}, Accuracy={avg_accuracy:.3f}, "
1691            f"Best Loss={self.best_loss:.4f}, "
1692            f"InfEpochs={self.consecutive_inf_epochs}, "
1693            f"ZeroGradPlateauEpochs={self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs}"
1694        )
1695
1696        # Early stop policy: unrecoverable exploding gradients across epochs
1697        if self.consecutive_inf_epochs > self.training_config.inf_epoch_patience:
1698            logging.error(
1699                "Early stop: Inf/exploding gradients persisted for too many consecutive epochs."
1700            )
1701            return avg_loss, True
1702
1703        # Early stop policy: vanishing gradients + plateau persistence
1704        if self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs >= 1:
1705            logging.error(
1706                "Early stop: persistent near-zero gradients with plateaued loss detected."
1707            )
1708            return avg_loss, True
1709        
1710        return avg_loss, False  # No NaN detected
1711    
1712    def _save_rolling_checkpoint(self, epoch: int, path: str = "checkpoints"):
1713        """Save a rolling checkpoint and manage the queue"""
1714        os.makedirs(path, exist_ok=True)
1715        
1716        filename = f"titan_rolling_step_{self.global_step}.pt"
1717        checkpoint_path = os.path.join(path, filename)
1718        
1719        checkpoint = {
1720            'epoch': epoch,
1721            'global_step': self.global_step,
1722            'model_state_dict': self.model.state_dict(),
1723            'optimizer_state_dict': self.optimizer.state_dict(),
1724            'scheduler_state_dict': self.scheduler.state_dict(),
1725            'scaler_state_dict': self.scaler.state_dict(),
1726            'config': self.config,
1727            'best_loss': self.best_loss,
1728            'model_class': self.model.__class__.__name__
1729        }
1730        
1731        torch.save(checkpoint, checkpoint_path)
1732        logging.info(f"💾 Rolling checkpoint saved: {checkpoint_path}")
1733        
1734        # Add to queue
1735        self.rolling_checkpoints.append(checkpoint_path)
1736        
1737        # Remove old checkpoints if exceeding max
1738        while len(self.rolling_checkpoints) > self.training_config.max_rolling_checkpoints:
1739            old_checkpoint = self.rolling_checkpoints.pop(0)
1740            try:
1741                if os.path.exists(old_checkpoint):
1742                    os.remove(old_checkpoint)
1743                    logging.info(f"🗑️ Removed old rolling checkpoint: {old_checkpoint}")
1744            except Exception as e:
1745                logging.warning(f"Failed to remove old checkpoint {old_checkpoint}: {e}")
1746    
1747    def _maybe_save_best_checkpoint(self, epoch: int, current_loss: float, path: str = "checkpoints"):
1748        """Save checkpoint if it's among the top K best models"""
1749        os.makedirs(path, exist_ok=True)
1750        
1751        k = self.training_config.num_best_checkpoints
1752        
1753        # Use negative loss because heapq is a min-heap
1754        # We want to keep the K smallest losses (best models)
1755        should_save = False
1756        
1757        if len(self.best_checkpoints) < k:
1758            should_save = True
1759        elif current_loss < -self.best_checkpoints[0][0]:  # Compare with worst of the best
1760            should_save = True
1761        
1762        if should_save:
1763            filename = f"titan_best_loss_{current_loss:.6f}_step_{self.global_step}.pt"
1764            checkpoint_path = os.path.join(path, filename)
1765            
1766            checkpoint = {
1767                'epoch': epoch,
1768                'global_step': self.global_step,
1769                'model_state_dict': self.model.state_dict(),
1770                'optimizer_state_dict': self.optimizer.state_dict(),
1771                'scheduler_state_dict': self.scheduler.state_dict(),
1772                'scaler_state_dict': self.scaler.state_dict(),
1773                'config': self.config,
1774                'best_loss': current_loss,
1775                'model_class': self.model.__class__.__name__
1776            }
1777            
1778            torch.save(checkpoint, checkpoint_path)
1779            logging.info(f"⭐ Best model checkpoint saved: {checkpoint_path} (loss={current_loss:.6f})")
1780            
1781            # Add to heap (using negative loss for min-heap to act as max-heap)
1782            heapq.heappush(self.best_checkpoints, (-current_loss, checkpoint_path))
1783            
1784            # Remove worst of the best if exceeding K
1785            if len(self.best_checkpoints) > k:
1786                _, removed_path = heapq.heappop(self.best_checkpoints)
1787                try:
1788                    if os.path.exists(removed_path):
1789                        os.remove(removed_path)
1790                        logging.info(f"🗑️ Removed replaced best checkpoint: {removed_path}")
1791                except Exception as e:
1792                    logging.warning(f"Failed to remove old best checkpoint {removed_path}: {e}")
1793    
1794    def close(self):
1795        """Cleanup resources"""
1796        if self.csv_file:
1797            self.csv_file.close()
1798            logging.info(f"📊 CSV log closed: {self.training_config.csv_log_path}")
1799    
1800    def save_checkpoint(self, epoch: int, suffix: str = "", path: str = "checkpoints") -> str:
1801        """Save a comprehensive training checkpoint.
1802
1803        Includes model state, optimizer state, scheduler state, AMP scaler
1804        state, config, global step, and best loss.
1805
1806        Args:
1807            epoch: Current epoch number.
1808            suffix: Optional filename suffix (e.g. ``"_epoch_end"``).
1809            path: Directory to save the checkpoint in.
1810
1811        Returns:
1812            Absolute path to the saved checkpoint file.
1813        """
1814        os.makedirs(path, exist_ok=True)
1815        
1816        checkpoint = {
1817            'epoch': epoch,
1818            'global_step': self.global_step,
1819            'model_state_dict': self.model.state_dict(),
1820            'optimizer_state_dict': self.optimizer.state_dict(),
1821            'scheduler_state_dict': self.scheduler.state_dict(),
1822            'scaler_state_dict': self.scaler.state_dict(),
1823            'config': self.config,
1824            'best_loss': self.best_loss,
1825            'model_class': self.model.__class__.__name__
1826        }
1827        
1828        filename = f"titan_checkpoint_epoch_{epoch}{suffix}.pt"
1829        checkpoint_path = os.path.join(path, filename)
1830        
1831        torch.save(checkpoint, checkpoint_path)
1832        
1833        # Register with storage manager
1834        if self.storage_manager.register_file(checkpoint_path):
1835            logging.info(f"💾 Checkpoint saved: {checkpoint_path}")
1836        else:
1837            logging.warning(f"⚠️ Checkpoint saved but storage limit warning")
1838        
1839        return checkpoint_path
1840    
1841    def load_checkpoint(self, checkpoint_path: str):
1842        """Load a checkpoint and resume training state.
1843
1844        Restores model weights, optimizer state, scheduler state, AMP
1845        scaler state, global step, and best loss.
1846
1847        Args:
1848            checkpoint_path: Path to the checkpoint file.
1849
1850        Returns:
1851            The epoch number from the loaded checkpoint.
1852        """
1853        logging.info(f"📂 Loading checkpoint: {checkpoint_path}")
1854        
1855        checkpoint = torch.load(checkpoint_path, map_location=self.device)
1856        
1857        self.model.load_state_dict(checkpoint['model_state_dict'])
1858        self.optimizer.load_state_dict(checkpoint['optimizer_state_dict'])
1859        self.scheduler.load_state_dict(checkpoint['scheduler_state_dict'])
1860        self.scaler.load_state_dict(checkpoint['scaler_state_dict'])
1861        
1862        self.global_step = checkpoint['global_step']
1863        self.best_loss = checkpoint['best_loss']
1864        
1865        logging.info(f"✅ Checkpoint loaded - Global Step: {self.global_step}, Best Loss: {self.best_loss:.4f}")
1866        
1867        return checkpoint['epoch']
1868
1869    def save_pretrained_artifacts(self, output_dir: str, tokenizer: Any = None):
1870        """Save HuggingFace-compatible model and tokenizer artifacts.
1871
1872        Args:
1873            output_dir: Directory to save artifacts in.
1874            tokenizer: Optional tokenizer with ``save_pretrained`` support.
1875
1876        Raises:
1877            RuntimeError: If the model does not support ``save_pretrained``.
1878        """
1879        if not hasattr(self.model, "save_pretrained"):
1880            raise RuntimeError("Current model does not support save_pretrained")
1881
1882        os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
1883        self.model.save_pretrained(output_dir)
1884        logging.info("💾 Saved model with save_pretrained: %s", output_dir)
1885
1886        if tokenizer is not None and hasattr(tokenizer, "save_pretrained"):
1887            tokenizer.save_pretrained(output_dir)
1888            logging.info("💾 Saved tokenizer with save_pretrained: %s", output_dir)
@dataclass
class TrainingConfig: 
 40@dataclass
 41class TrainingConfig:
 42    """Configuration for training behavior, checkpointing, and stability controls.
 43
 44    Attributes:
 45        csv_log_path: Path for CSV training metrics log.
 46        csv_rotate_on_schema_change: If ``True``, rotate the CSV file when
 47            the column schema changes instead of raising an error.
 48        gpu_metrics_backend: GPU telemetry backend (``"nvml"`` or ``"none"``).
 49        nvml_device_index: NVML device index for multi-GPU systems.
 50        enable_block_grad_norms: Whether to collect per-block gradient norms.
 51        telemetry_log_interval: Steps between heavy telemetry collection.
 52        gpu_temp_guard_enabled: Whether GPU thermal guard is enabled.
 53        switch_on_thermal: Whether GPU→CPU thermal switching is enabled.
 54        gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c: Temperature in Celsius above which
 55            training is paused.
 56        gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c: Temperature in Celsius below which
 57            training resumes.
 58        gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c: Optional critical temperature for
 59            emergency GPU→CPU offload.
 60        gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds: Seconds between temperature polls
 61            while paused.
 62        checkpoint_every_n_steps: Save a rolling checkpoint every N steps.
 63        max_rolling_checkpoints: Maximum number of rolling checkpoints to keep.
 64        num_best_checkpoints: Number of best-loss checkpoints to retain.
 65        nan_check_interval: Check for NaN loss every N steps.
 66        log_gradient_stats: Whether to log gradient statistics.
 67        gradient_log_interval: Steps between gradient stat logging.
 68        gradient_accumulation_steps: Number of steps to accumulate gradients
 69            before an optimizer update.
 70        optimizer_class: Optimizer class name (e.g. ``"adamw"``).
 71        optimizer_parameters: Dictionary of optimizer-specific parameters.
 72        scheduler_total_steps: Total steps for the learning rate scheduler.
 73        scheduler_warmup_ratio: Fraction of total steps used for warmup.
 74        scheduler_type: Scheduler type (``"cosine"``, ``"constant"``, or
 75            ``"linear_warmup_then_constant"``).
 76        max_nan_retries: Maximum retries per batch when NaN is detected.
 77        grad_clip_max_norm: Maximum gradient norm for clipping.
 78        inf_post_clip_threshold: Gradient norm above which the step is
 79            considered to have exploding gradients.
 80        min_grad_norm_for_signal: Minimum gradient norm below which
 81            gradients are considered zero.
 82        inf_epoch_patience: Consecutive inf-epochs before early stop.
 83        zero_grad_plateau_patience: Consecutive zero-gradient plateau
 84            epochs before early stop.
 85        use_galore: Whether to enable GaLore low-rank gradient projection.
 86        galore_rank: Rank for GaLore SVD projection.
 87        galore_update_interval: Steps between GaLore projection updates.
 88        galore_scale: Scaling factor for GaLore projected gradients.
 89        galore_max_dim: Maximum dimension for GaLore projection.
 90        use_amp: Whether to use automatic mixed precision (FP16/BF16).
 91    """
 92    # CSV Logging
 93    csv_log_path: str = "training_metrics.csv"
 94    csv_rotate_on_schema_change: bool = True
 95    gpu_metrics_backend: str = "nvml"
 96    nvml_device_index: int = 0
 97    enable_block_grad_norms: bool = True
 98    telemetry_log_interval: int = 1
 99    gpu_temp_guard_enabled: bool = True
100    switch_on_thermal: bool = False
101    gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c: float = 90.0
102    gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c: float = 80.0
103    gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c: Optional[float] = None
104    gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds: float = 30.0
105    
106    # Rolling Checkpoints
107    checkpoint_every_n_steps: int = 500  # Save every N steps
108    max_rolling_checkpoints: int = 3     # Keep only last N rolling checkpoints
109    
110    # Best Model Checkpoints
111    num_best_checkpoints: int = 2        # Keep top K best models
112    
113    # NaN Detection
114    nan_check_interval: int = 10         # Check for NaN every N steps
115    
116    # Gradient monitoring
117    log_gradient_stats: bool = True
118    gradient_log_interval: int = 100
119    gradient_accumulation_steps: int = 4
120
121    # Optimizer chooser (hard-migrated format from YAML)
122    optimizer_class: str = "adamw"
123    optimizer_parameters: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
124
125    # Scheduler configuration
126    scheduler_total_steps: int = 10000
127    scheduler_warmup_ratio: float = 0.1
128    scheduler_type: str = "cosine"
129
130    # Post-backward stability
131    max_nan_retries: int = 3
132    grad_clip_max_norm: float = 5.0  # Increased from 1.0 - too aggressive clipping was causing issues
133    inf_post_clip_threshold: float = 100.0  # Increased from 10.0 - more conservative threshold
134    min_grad_norm_for_signal: float = 1e-10
135    inf_epoch_patience: int = 5
136    zero_grad_plateau_patience: int = 5
137
138    # GaLore (low-rank gradient projection)
139    use_galore: bool = False
140    galore_rank: int = 64
141    galore_update_interval: int = 1
142    galore_scale: float = 1.0
143    galore_max_dim: int = 4096
144
145    # Precision control
146    # NOTE: Default False because hybrid ODE/SSM blocks can become unstable in fp16 on older GPUs (e.g., Tesla P40).
147    use_amp: bool = False

Configuration for training behavior, checkpointing, and stability controls.

Attributes:
  • csv_log_path: Path for CSV training metrics log.
  • csv_rotate_on_schema_change: If True, rotate the CSV file when the column schema changes instead of raising an error.
  • gpu_metrics_backend: GPU telemetry backend ("nvml" or "none").
  • nvml_device_index: NVML device index for multi-GPU systems.
  • enable_block_grad_norms: Whether to collect per-block gradient norms.
  • telemetry_log_interval: Steps between heavy telemetry collection.
  • gpu_temp_guard_enabled: Whether GPU thermal guard is enabled.
  • switch_on_thermal: Whether GPU→CPU thermal switching is enabled.
  • gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c: Temperature in Celsius above which training is paused.
  • gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c: Temperature in Celsius below which training resumes.
  • gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c: Optional critical temperature for emergency GPU→CPU offload.
  • gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds: Seconds between temperature polls while paused.
  • checkpoint_every_n_steps: Save a rolling checkpoint every N steps.
  • max_rolling_checkpoints: Maximum number of rolling checkpoints to keep.
  • num_best_checkpoints: Number of best-loss checkpoints to retain.
  • nan_check_interval: Check for NaN loss every N steps.
  • log_gradient_stats: Whether to log gradient statistics.
  • gradient_log_interval: Steps between gradient stat logging.
  • gradient_accumulation_steps: Number of steps to accumulate gradients before an optimizer update.
  • optimizer_class: Optimizer class name (e.g. "adamw").
  • optimizer_parameters: Dictionary of optimizer-specific parameters.
  • scheduler_total_steps: Total steps for the learning rate scheduler.
  • scheduler_warmup_ratio: Fraction of total steps used for warmup.
  • scheduler_type: Scheduler type ("cosine", "constant", or "linear_warmup_then_constant").
  • max_nan_retries: Maximum retries per batch when NaN is detected.
  • grad_clip_max_norm: Maximum gradient norm for clipping.
  • inf_post_clip_threshold: Gradient norm above which the step is considered to have exploding gradients.
  • min_grad_norm_for_signal: Minimum gradient norm below which gradients are considered zero.
  • inf_epoch_patience: Consecutive inf-epochs before early stop.
  • zero_grad_plateau_patience: Consecutive zero-gradient plateau epochs before early stop.
  • use_galore: Whether to enable GaLore low-rank gradient projection.
  • galore_rank: Rank for GaLore SVD projection.
  • galore_update_interval: Steps between GaLore projection updates.
  • galore_scale: Scaling factor for GaLore projected gradients.
  • galore_max_dim: Maximum dimension for GaLore projection.
  • use_amp: Whether to use automatic mixed precision (FP16/BF16).
TrainingConfig( csv_log_path: str = 'training_metrics.csv', csv_rotate_on_schema_change: bool = True, gpu_metrics_backend: str = 'nvml', nvml_device_index: int = 0, enable_block_grad_norms: bool = True, telemetry_log_interval: int = 1, gpu_temp_guard_enabled: bool = True, switch_on_thermal: bool = False, gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c: float = 90.0, gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c: float = 80.0, gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c: float | None = None, gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds: float = 30.0, checkpoint_every_n_steps: int = 500, max_rolling_checkpoints: int = 3, num_best_checkpoints: int = 2, nan_check_interval: int = 10, log_gradient_stats: bool = True, gradient_log_interval: int = 100, gradient_accumulation_steps: int = 4, optimizer_class: str = 'adamw', optimizer_parameters: Dict[str, Any] = <factory>, scheduler_total_steps: int = 10000, scheduler_warmup_ratio: float = 0.1, scheduler_type: str = 'cosine', max_nan_retries: int = 3, grad_clip_max_norm: float = 5.0, inf_post_clip_threshold: float = 100.0, min_grad_norm_for_signal: float = 1e-10, inf_epoch_patience: int = 5, zero_grad_plateau_patience: int = 5, use_galore: bool = False, galore_rank: int = 64, galore_update_interval: int = 1, galore_scale: float = 1.0, galore_max_dim: int = 4096, use_amp: bool = False)
csv_log_path: str = 'training_metrics.csv'
csv_rotate_on_schema_change: bool = True
gpu_metrics_backend: str = 'nvml'
nvml_device_index: int = 0
enable_block_grad_norms: bool = True
telemetry_log_interval: int = 1
gpu_temp_guard_enabled: bool = True
switch_on_thermal: bool = False
gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c: float = 90.0
gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c: float = 80.0
gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c: float | None = None
gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds: float = 30.0
checkpoint_every_n_steps: int = 500
max_rolling_checkpoints: int = 3
num_best_checkpoints: int = 2
nan_check_interval: int = 10
log_gradient_stats: bool = True
gradient_log_interval: int = 100
gradient_accumulation_steps: int = 4
optimizer_class: str = 'adamw'
optimizer_parameters: Dict[str, Any]
scheduler_total_steps: int = 10000
scheduler_warmup_ratio: float = 0.1
scheduler_type: str = 'cosine'
max_nan_retries: int = 3
grad_clip_max_norm: float = 5.0
inf_post_clip_threshold: float = 100.0
min_grad_norm_for_signal: float = 1e-10
inf_epoch_patience: int = 5
zero_grad_plateau_patience: int = 5
use_galore: bool = False
galore_rank: int = 64
galore_update_interval: int = 1
galore_scale: float = 1.0
galore_max_dim: int = 4096
use_amp: bool = False
class TitanTrainer: 
 150class TitanTrainer:
 151    """Advanced trainer for TORMENTED-BERT-Frankenstein with stability controls.
 152
 153    Implements a production-grade training loop with gradient accumulation,
 154    automatic mixed precision (AMP), gradient clipping, NaN detection with
 155    automatic retry and learning rate scaling, rolling and best-loss
 156    checkpointing, GPU thermal guard integration, GaLore low-rank gradient
 157    projection, and CSV telemetry logging.
 158
 159    Attributes:
 160        model: The PyTorch model being trained.
 161        config: Model configuration (:class:`UltraConfig` or HF config).
 162        training_config: :class:`TrainingConfig` with stability parameters.
 163        device: Resolved PyTorch device string.
 164        optimizer: Configured optimizer with per-component parameter groups.
 165        scaler: AMP gradient scaler.
 166        scheduler: Learning rate scheduler with warmup.
 167        storage_manager: :class:`StorageManager` for disk usage tracking.
 168        global_step: Current global training step counter.
 169        best_loss: Best (lowest) loss observed so far.
 170        gradient_accumulation_steps: Number of steps between optimizer updates.
 171        gpu_temp_guard: :class:`GPUTemperatureGuard` for thermal safety.
 172    """
 173
 174    def __init__(self, model: torch.nn.Module, config: Optional[Any],
 175                 training_config: TrainingConfig = None,
 176                 device: str = None): #torch.device = None):
 177        """Initialize the trainer.
 178
 179        Args:
 180            model: PyTorch model to train.
 181            config: Model configuration object (e.g. :class:`UltraConfig`).
 182            training_config: :class:`TrainingConfig` with stability and
 183                checkpointing parameters. Uses defaults if ``None``.
 184            device: Target device string. Defaults to CUDA if available,
 185                otherwise CPU.
 186        """
 187        self.model = model
 188        self.config = config
 189        self.training_config = training_config or TrainingConfig()
 190        self.device = device if device else ("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
 191        self._primary_device = str(self.device)
 192        if (
 193            self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c is not None
 194            and self._primary_device.startswith("cuda")
 195        ):
 196            self.training_config.switch_on_thermal = True
 197        self._configured_use_amp = bool(self.training_config.use_amp)
 198        self.use_amp = (
 199            self._configured_use_amp
 200            and torch.cuda.is_available()
 201            and self._primary_device.startswith("cuda")
 202        )
 203        self.amp_dtype = torch.float16
 204        if self.use_amp and torch.cuda.is_bf16_supported():
 205            self.amp_dtype = torch.bfloat16
 206        self.model.to(self.device)
 207        
 208        # Specialized optimizer for hybrid architecture
 209        self.optimizer = self._setup_optimizer()
 210        
 211        # Mixed precision with aggressive scaling for BitNet
 212        self.scaler = GradScaler(
 213            self.device,
 214            init_scale=2.**10,  # Lower initial scale for BitNet stability
 215            growth_factor=1.5,  # Conservative growth
 216            backoff_factor=0.8,
 217            growth_interval=100
 218        )
 219        
 220        # Learning rate scheduler with warmup for ODE dynamics
 221        self.scheduler = self._setup_scheduler()
 222        
 223        # Storage monitoring
 224        self.storage_manager = StorageManager()
 225        
 226        # Training state tracking
 227        self.global_step = 0
 228        self.best_loss = float('inf')
 229        
 230        # Gradient accumulation for effective larger batches
 231        self.gradient_accumulation_steps = max(int(self.training_config.gradient_accumulation_steps), 1)
 232        
 233        # === NEW: CSV Logger ===
 234        self.csv_file = None
 235        self.csv_writer = None
 236        self.csv_columns = self._get_csv_columns()
 237
 238        # Optional NVML state (best-effort telemetry)
 239        self._nvml_module = None
 240        self._nvml_handle = None
 241        self._nvml_disabled = False
 242        self._nvml_warning_logged = False
 243        self._last_guard_temp_c: Optional[float] = None
 244        self._pending_thermal_repair_action = "none"
 245        self._thermal_offload_active = False
 246        self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic: Optional[float] = None
 247        self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = 0.0
 248        self._thermal_emergency_last_checkpoint: Optional[str] = None
 249        self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error = False
 250        self.gpu_temp_guard = GPUTemperatureGuard(
 251            enabled=bool(self.training_config.gpu_temp_guard_enabled),
 252            device=str(self.device),
 253            nvml_device_index=int(self.training_config.nvml_device_index),
 254            pause_threshold_c=float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c),
 255            resume_threshold_c=float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c),
 256            critical_threshold_c=self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c,
 257            poll_interval_seconds=float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds),
 258        )
 259
 260        self._init_csv_logger()
 261        
 262        # === NEW: Rolling checkpoint tracking ===
 263        self.rolling_checkpoints: List[str] = []  # FIFO queue of checkpoint paths
 264        self.thermal_emergency_checkpoints: List[str] = []
 265        
 266        # === NEW: Best checkpoints tracking (min-heap by negative loss for max extraction) ===
 267        # Format: [(-loss, checkpoint_path), ...]
 268        self.best_checkpoints: List[Tuple[float, str]] = []
 269        
 270        # === NEW: NaN detection state ===
 271        self.nan_detected = False
 272        self.last_valid_state = None  # For debugging
 273
 274        # Stability / early-stop state
 275        self.current_epoch_had_inf = False
 276        self.consecutive_inf_epochs = 0
 277        self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs = 0
 278        self.non_improving_epochs = 0
 279        
 280        self._log_setup()
 281
 282    def _get_csv_columns(self) -> List[str]:
 283        """CSV schema for step-level training metrics."""
 284        return [
 285            'timestamp', 'epoch', 'step', 'global_step',
 286            'loss', 'accuracy', 'learning_rate', 'grad_norm',
 287            'scaler_scale', 'gpu_memory_gb', 'gpu_cached_gb',
 288            'has_nan', 'has_inf', 'has_zero', 'repair_action',
 289            'gpu_temp_c', 'gpu_power_w', 'gpu_util_pct', 'gpu_mem_used_mib',
 290            'grad_norm_embeddings', 'grad_norm_attention', 'grad_norm_ffn',
 291            'grad_norm_experts', 'grad_norm_router', 'grad_norm_ode',
 292            'grad_norm_retnet', 'grad_norm_mamba', 'grad_norm_norms',
 293            'grad_norm_head', 'grad_norm_other',
 294            'step_time_ms', 'tokens_per_sec', 'clip_ratio', 'effective_batch_size'
 295        ]
 296
 297    def _get_default_gpu_telemetry(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 298        return {
 299            "gpu_temp_c": 0.0,
 300            "gpu_power_w": 0.0,
 301            "gpu_util_pct": 0.0,
 302            "gpu_mem_used_mib": 0.0,
 303        }
 304
 305    def _get_default_block_grad_norms(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 306        return {
 307            "embeddings": 0.0,
 308            "attention": 0.0,
 309            "ffn": 0.0,
 310            "experts": 0.0,
 311            "router": 0.0,
 312            "ode": 0.0,
 313            "retnet": 0.0,
 314            "mamba": 0.0,
 315            "norms": 0.0,
 316            "head": 0.0,
 317            "other": 0.0,
 318        }
 319
 320    def _append_repair_action(self, current: str, extra: str) -> str:
 321        cur = str(current or "none").strip() or "none"
 322        add = str(extra or "none").strip() or "none"
 323        if add == "none":
 324            return cur
 325        if cur == "none":
 326            return add
 327        existing = set(cur.split("+"))
 328        if add in existing:
 329            return cur
 330        return f"{cur}+{add}"
 331
 332    def _register_thermal_emergency_checkpoint(self, checkpoint_path: str):
 333        self.thermal_emergency_checkpoints.append(checkpoint_path)
 334        max_keep = max(int(self.training_config.max_rolling_checkpoints), 1)
 335        while len(self.thermal_emergency_checkpoints) > max_keep:
 336            old_checkpoint = self.thermal_emergency_checkpoints.pop(0)
 337            try:
 338                if os.path.exists(old_checkpoint):
 339                    os.remove(old_checkpoint)
 340                    logging.info(
 341                        "🗑️ Removed old thermal emergency checkpoint: %s",
 342                        old_checkpoint,
 343                    )
 344            except Exception as exc:
 345                logging.warning(
 346                    "Failed to remove old thermal emergency checkpoint %s: %s",
 347                    old_checkpoint,
 348                    exc,
 349                )
 350
 351    def _save_thermal_emergency_checkpoint(self, epoch: int, batch_idx: int, temp_c: float) -> str:
 352        safe_temp = str(f"{float(temp_c):.1f}").replace(".", "p")
 353        suffix = (
 354            f"_thermal_emergency_step_{self.global_step}"
 355            f"_batch_{batch_idx + 1}_temp_{safe_temp}c"
 356        )
 357        checkpoint_path = self.save_checkpoint(epoch, suffix=suffix)
 358        self._register_thermal_emergency_checkpoint(checkpoint_path)
 359        logging.warning(
 360            "🚨 Thermal emergency checkpoint created before GPU offload: %s",
 361            checkpoint_path,
 362        )
 363        return checkpoint_path
 364
 365    def _move_optimizer_state_tensors(self, device: str):
 366        target = torch.device(device)
 367
 368        def _move_value(value):
 369            if torch.is_tensor(value):
 370                return value.to(target)
 371            if isinstance(value, dict):
 372                return {k: _move_value(v) for k, v in value.items()}
 373            if isinstance(value, list):
 374                return [_move_value(v) for v in value]
 375            if isinstance(value, tuple):
 376                return tuple(_move_value(v) for v in value)
 377            return value
 378
 379        for param_state in self.optimizer.state.values():
 380            if not isinstance(param_state, dict):
 381                continue
 382            for key, value in list(param_state.items()):
 383                param_state[key] = _move_value(value)
 384
 385    def _offload_training_state_to_cpu(self):
 386        self.model.to("cpu")
 387        self._move_optimizer_state_tensors("cpu")
 388        self.device = "cpu"
 389        self.use_amp = False
 390        if torch.cuda.is_available():
 391            torch.cuda.empty_cache()
 392
 393    def _reload_training_state_to_device(self):
 394        target_device = self._primary_device
 395        self.model.to(target_device)
 396        self._move_optimizer_state_tensors(target_device)
 397        self.device = target_device
 398        self.use_amp = (
 399            self._configured_use_amp
 400            and torch.cuda.is_available()
 401            and str(target_device).startswith("cuda")
 402        )
 403        if torch.cuda.is_available():
 404            torch.cuda.empty_cache()
 405
 406    def _wait_for_gpu_resume_temperature(self, context: str) -> Tuple[float, float, int]:
 407        resume_threshold = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.resume_threshold_c)
 408        poll_interval = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.poll_interval_seconds)
 409        temp_c = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.read_temperature_c())
 410        checks = 0
 411        started = time.perf_counter()
 412        while temp_c > resume_threshold:
 413            logging.warning(
 414                "[ThermalOffload] %s waiting on CPU: GPU %.1fC (resume <= %.1fC)",
 415                context,
 416                temp_c,
 417                resume_threshold,
 418            )
 419            time.sleep(poll_interval)
 420            checks += 1
 421            temp_c = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.read_temperature_c())
 422        duration_s = time.perf_counter() - started
 423        return temp_c, duration_s, checks
 424
 425    def _is_cuda_or_nvidia_runtime_error(self, exc: RuntimeError) -> bool:
 426        message = str(exc).lower()
 427        gpu_error_tokens = (
 428            "cuda",
 429            "cudnn",
 430            "cublas",
 431            "device-side assert",
 432            "nvidia",
 433            "driver",
 434            "out of memory",
 435        )
 436        return any(token in message for token in gpu_error_tokens)
 437
 438    def _switch_to_cpu_only_after_gpu_error(
 439        self,
 440        *,
 441        exc: RuntimeError,
 442        epoch: int,
 443        batch_idx: int,
 444    ) -> bool:
 445        if not bool(self.training_config.switch_on_thermal):
 446            return False
 447        if self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error:
 448            return False
 449        if not self._is_cuda_or_nvidia_runtime_error(exc):
 450            return False
 451        if not str(self.device).startswith("cuda"):
 452            return False
 453
 454        logging.error(
 455            "[ThermalSwitch] GPU runtime error detected; switching to CPU-only mode for remaining training: %s",
 456            exc,
 457        )
 458        try:
 459            checkpoint_path = self.save_checkpoint(
 460                epoch,
 461                suffix=f"_gpu_error_cpu_fallback_step_{self.global_step}_batch_{batch_idx + 1}",
 462            )
 463            self._register_thermal_emergency_checkpoint(checkpoint_path)
 464            self._thermal_emergency_last_checkpoint = checkpoint_path
 465            logging.warning(
 466                "[ThermalSwitch] Saved GPU error emergency checkpoint: %s",
 467                checkpoint_path,
 468            )
 469        except Exception as ckpt_exc:
 470            logging.exception(
 471                "[ThermalSwitch] Failed to save GPU error emergency checkpoint: %s",
 472                ckpt_exc,
 473            )
 474
 475        self._offload_training_state_to_cpu()
 476        self._thermal_offload_active = False
 477        self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic = None
 478        self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = 0.0
 479        self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error = True
 480        return True
 481
 482    def _monitor_thermal_offload_and_maybe_reload(self, epoch: int, batch_idx: int) -> str:
 483        if not self._thermal_offload_active:
 484            return "none"
 485        if self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error:
 486            return "thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error"
 487
 488        context = f"mlm epoch={epoch + 1} batch={batch_idx + 1}"
 489        now = time.perf_counter()
 490        started = (
 491            self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic
 492            if self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic is not None
 493            else now
 494        )
 495        elapsed_s = max(now - started, 0.0)
 496        poll_interval = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.poll_interval_seconds)
 497        if (now - self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic) < poll_interval:
 498            return f"thermal_cpu_training_{int(round(elapsed_s))}s"
 499
 500        self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = now
 501        temp_c = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.read_temperature_c())
 502        self._last_guard_temp_c = temp_c
 503        resume_threshold = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.resume_threshold_c)
 504        if temp_c > resume_threshold:
 505            logging.warning(
 506                "[ThermalOffload] %s continuing CPU training: GPU %.1fC (resume <= %.1fC)",
 507                context,
 508                temp_c,
 509                resume_threshold,
 510            )
 511            return f"thermal_cpu_training_{int(round(elapsed_s))}s"
 512
 513        checkpoint_path = self._thermal_emergency_last_checkpoint
 514        try:
 515            self._reload_training_state_to_device()
 516        except Exception as exc:
 517            logging.error(
 518                "[ThermalSwitch] Failed to reload to GPU after thermal CPU mode. "
 519                "Switching to CPU-only mode. Emergency checkpoint: %s. Error: %s",
 520                checkpoint_path or "unavailable",
 521                exc,
 522            )
 523            self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error = True
 524            self._thermal_offload_active = False
 525            self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic = None
 526            self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = 0.0
 527            return "thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error"
 528
 529        self._thermal_offload_active = False
 530        self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic = None
 531        self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = 0.0
 532        logging.warning(
 533            "[ThermalOffload] %s resumed GPU training after %.1fs at %.1fC",
 534            context,
 535            elapsed_s,
 536            temp_c,
 537        )
 538        return f"thermal_onload_gpu_{int(round(elapsed_s))}s"
 539
 540    def _handle_critical_thermal_offload(self, epoch: int, batch_idx: int, temp_c: float) -> str:
 541        if not bool(self.training_config.switch_on_thermal):
 542            return "none"
 543        if self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error:
 544            return "thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error"
 545        if self._thermal_offload_active:
 546            return self._monitor_thermal_offload_and_maybe_reload(epoch, batch_idx)
 547
 548        context = f"mlm epoch={epoch + 1} batch={batch_idx + 1}"
 549        checkpoint_path: Optional[str] = None
 550        logging.warning(
 551            "[ThermalOffload] %s critical threshold reached at %.1fC; switching to CPU training mode",
 552            context,
 553            temp_c,
 554        )
 555        try:
 556            checkpoint_path = self._save_thermal_emergency_checkpoint(epoch, batch_idx, temp_c)
 557        except Exception as exc:
 558            logging.exception(
 559                "[ThermalOffload] %s failed to save emergency checkpoint before offload: %s",
 560                context,
 561                exc,
 562            )
 563
 564        self._offload_training_state_to_cpu()
 565        self._thermal_offload_active = True
 566        self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic = time.perf_counter()
 567        self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = 0.0
 568        self._thermal_emergency_last_checkpoint = checkpoint_path
 569        self._last_guard_temp_c = float(temp_c)
 570        return "thermal_offload_cpu_mode"
 571
 572    def _enforce_thermal_guard(self, epoch: int, batch_idx: int) -> str:
 573        if not self.gpu_temp_guard.is_active:
 574            self._last_guard_temp_c = None
 575            return "none"
 576        if self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error:
 577            return "thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error"
 578        if self._thermal_offload_active:
 579            return self._monitor_thermal_offload_and_maybe_reload(epoch, batch_idx)
 580
 581        if not bool(self.training_config.switch_on_thermal):
 582            context = f"mlm epoch={epoch + 1} batch={batch_idx + 1}"
 583            temp_c = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.read_temperature_c())
 584            self._last_guard_temp_c = temp_c
 585            if temp_c > float(self.gpu_temp_guard.pause_threshold_c):
 586                result = self.gpu_temp_guard.wait_until_safe(context=context)
 587                self._last_guard_temp_c = result.temp_c
 588                return result.repair_action
 589            return "none"
 590
 591        context = f"mlm epoch={epoch + 1} batch={batch_idx + 1}"
 592        temp_c = float(self.gpu_temp_guard.read_temperature_c())
 593        self._last_guard_temp_c = temp_c
 594
 595        critical_threshold = self.gpu_temp_guard.critical_threshold_c
 596        if critical_threshold is not None and temp_c >= float(critical_threshold):
 597            return self._handle_critical_thermal_offload(epoch, batch_idx, temp_c)
 598
 599        if temp_c > float(self.gpu_temp_guard.pause_threshold_c):
 600            result = self.gpu_temp_guard.wait_until_safe(context=context)
 601            self._last_guard_temp_c = result.temp_c
 602            return result.repair_action
 603        return "none"
 604
 605    def _merge_guard_temperature(self, telemetry: Dict[str, float]) -> Dict[str, float]:
 606        merged = dict(telemetry)
 607        if self.gpu_temp_guard.is_active and self._last_guard_temp_c is not None:
 608            merged["gpu_temp_c"] = float(self._last_guard_temp_c)
 609        return merged
 610
 611    def _read_csv_header(self, csv_path: str) -> Optional[List[str]]:
 612        if not os.path.exists(csv_path) or os.path.getsize(csv_path) == 0:
 613            return None
 614        with open(csv_path, 'r', newline='', encoding='utf-8') as handle:
 615            reader = csv.reader(handle)
 616            return next(reader, None)
 617    
 618    def _init_csv_logger(self):
 619        """Initialize CSV file for metrics logging"""
 620        csv_path = self.training_config.csv_log_path
 621        csv_dir = os.path.dirname(csv_path)
 622        if csv_dir:
 623            os.makedirs(csv_dir, exist_ok=True)
 624
 625        file_exists = os.path.exists(csv_path)
 626        if file_exists:
 627            existing_header = self._read_csv_header(csv_path)
 628            if existing_header is not None and existing_header != self.csv_columns:
 629                if self.training_config.csv_rotate_on_schema_change:
 630                    base, ext = os.path.splitext(csv_path)
 631                    if not ext:
 632                        ext = ".csv"
 633                    rotated_path = f"{base}.{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}{ext}"
 634                    os.replace(csv_path, rotated_path)
 635                    logging.info(
 636                        f"CSV schema changed. Rotated previous log to: {rotated_path}"
 637                    )
 638                    file_exists = False
 639                else:
 640                    raise RuntimeError(
 641                        "CSV schema mismatch for existing metrics file. "
 642                        "Enable csv_rotate_on_schema_change or remove the old CSV."
 643                    )
 644
 645        self.csv_file = open(csv_path, 'a', newline='', encoding='utf-8')
 646        self.csv_writer = csv.writer(self.csv_file)
 647
 648        # Write header for new or empty file
 649        should_write_header = (not file_exists) or os.path.getsize(csv_path) == 0
 650        if should_write_header:
 651            self.csv_writer.writerow(self.csv_columns)
 652            self.csv_file.flush()
 653
 654    def _get_gpu_telemetry(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 655        """Collect GPU telemetry with best-effort NVML fallback."""
 656        telemetry = self._get_default_gpu_telemetry()
 657        if not torch.cuda.is_available():
 658            return telemetry
 659
 660        backend = str(self.training_config.gpu_metrics_backend).strip().lower()
 661        if backend == "none":
 662            return telemetry
 663        if backend != "nvml":
 664            return telemetry
 665        if self._nvml_disabled:
 666            return self._get_gpu_telemetry_from_nvidia_smi()
 667
 668        if self._nvml_module is None or self._nvml_handle is None:
 669            try:
 670                import pynvml  # type: ignore
 671
 672                pynvml.nvmlInit()
 673                idx = int(self.training_config.nvml_device_index)
 674                self._nvml_handle = pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetHandleByIndex(idx)
 675                self._nvml_module = pynvml
 676            except Exception as exc:
 677                self._nvml_disabled = True
 678                if not self._nvml_warning_logged:
 679                    logging.warning(f"NVML telemetry unavailable, falling back to nvidia-smi: {exc}")
 680                    self._nvml_warning_logged = True
 681                return self._get_gpu_telemetry_from_nvidia_smi()
 682
 683        try:
 684            pynvml = self._nvml_module
 685            handle = self._nvml_handle
 686            utilization = pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetUtilizationRates(handle)
 687            memory_info = pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetMemoryInfo(handle)
 688            telemetry["gpu_temp_c"] = float(
 689                pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetTemperature(handle, pynvml.NVML_TEMPERATURE_GPU)
 690            )
 691            telemetry["gpu_power_w"] = float(pynvml.nvmlDeviceGetPowerUsage(handle)) / 1000.0
 692            telemetry["gpu_util_pct"] = float(utilization.gpu)
 693            telemetry["gpu_mem_used_mib"] = float(memory_info.used) / (1024.0 ** 2)
 694        except Exception as exc:
 695            if not self._nvml_warning_logged:
 696                logging.warning(f"Failed reading NVML telemetry, falling back to nvidia-smi: {exc}")
 697                self._nvml_warning_logged = True
 698            return self._get_gpu_telemetry_from_nvidia_smi()
 699        return telemetry
 700
 701    def _parse_smi_value(self, raw: str) -> float:
 702        value = raw.strip()
 703        if not value or value.lower() in {"n/a", "[not supported]"}:
 704            return 0.0
 705        match = re.search(r"[-+]?\d*\.?\d+", value)
 706        if match is None:
 707            return 0.0
 708        try:
 709            return float(match.group(0))
 710        except ValueError:
 711            return 0.0
 712
 713    def _get_gpu_telemetry_from_nvidia_smi(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 714        telemetry = self._get_default_gpu_telemetry()
 715        cmd = [
 716            "nvidia-smi",
 717            "--query-gpu=temperature.gpu,power.draw,utilization.gpu,memory.used",
 718            "--format=csv,noheader,nounits",
 719            "-i",
 720            str(int(self.training_config.nvml_device_index)),
 721        ]
 722        try:
 723            result = subprocess.run(
 724                cmd,
 725                check=True,
 726                capture_output=True,
 727                text=True,
 728                timeout=2.0,
 729            )
 730            line = result.stdout.strip().splitlines()[0]
 731            parts = [p.strip() for p in line.split(",")]
 732            if len(parts) >= 4:
 733                telemetry["gpu_temp_c"] = self._parse_smi_value(parts[0])
 734                telemetry["gpu_power_w"] = self._parse_smi_value(parts[1])
 735                telemetry["gpu_util_pct"] = self._parse_smi_value(parts[2])
 736                telemetry["gpu_mem_used_mib"] = self._parse_smi_value(parts[3])
 737        except Exception:
 738            # Best-effort fallback: keep zeros if nvidia-smi is unavailable/unreadable.
 739            pass
 740        return telemetry
 741
 742    def _bucket_for_param_name(self, param_name: str) -> str:
 743        name = param_name.lower()
 744        if "router" in name:
 745            return "router"
 746        if "experts" in name:
 747            return "experts"
 748        if "embed" in name or ".emb." in name or "factorized_embedding" in name:
 749            return "embeddings"
 750        if "ode" in name:
 751            return "ode"
 752        if "retnet" in name or "retention" in name:
 753            return "retnet"
 754        if "mamba" in name:
 755            return "mamba"
 756        if "ffn" in name:
 757            return "ffn"
 758        if "norm" in name:
 759            return "norms"
 760        if name.startswith("head") or ".head." in name:
 761            return "head"
 762        if (
 763            "attn" in name
 764            or "attention" in name
 765            or "q_proj" in name
 766            or "k_proj" in name
 767            or "v_proj" in name
 768            or "out_proj" in name
 769        ):
 770            return "attention"
 771        return "other"
 772
 773    def _collect_block_grad_norms(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 774        """Collect L2 gradient norms by fixed logical component buckets."""
 775        bucket_sq_sums = {k: 0.0 for k in self._get_default_block_grad_norms().keys()}
 776        if not self.training_config.enable_block_grad_norms:
 777            return self._get_default_block_grad_norms()
 778
 779        for name, param in self.model.named_parameters():
 780            if param.grad is None:
 781                continue
 782            grad = param.grad.detach()
 783            bucket = self._bucket_for_param_name(name)
 784            bucket_sq_sums[bucket] += float((grad.float().pow(2).sum()).item())
 785
 786        return {key: math.sqrt(max(val, 0.0)) for key, val in bucket_sq_sums.items()}
 787    
 788    def _log_step_to_csv(self, epoch: int, step: int, loss: float, accuracy: float,
 789                         lr: float, grad_norm: float = 0.0,
 790                         has_nan: bool = False, has_inf: bool = False,
 791                         has_zero: bool = False, repair_action: str = "none",
 792                         gpu_telemetry: Optional[Dict[str, float]] = None,
 793                         block_grad_norms: Optional[Dict[str, float]] = None,
 794                         step_time_ms: float = 0.0, tokens_per_sec: float = 0.0,
 795                         clip_ratio: float = 0.0, effective_batch_size: int = 0):
 796        """Log a single training step to CSV"""
 797        gpu_memory = 0.0
 798        gpu_cached = 0.0
 799        if torch.cuda.is_available():
 800            gpu_memory = torch.cuda.memory_allocated() / 1024**3
 801            gpu_cached = torch.cuda.memory_reserved() / 1024**3
 802
 803        telemetry = gpu_telemetry or self._get_default_gpu_telemetry()
 804        grad_buckets = block_grad_norms or self._get_default_block_grad_norms()
 805        
 806        self.csv_writer.writerow([
 807            datetime.now().isoformat(),
 808            epoch,
 809            step,
 810            self.global_step,
 811            f'{loss:.6f}',
 812            f'{accuracy:.6f}',
 813            f'{lr:.8e}',
 814            f'{grad_norm:.6f}',
 815            f'{self.scaler.get_scale():.2f}',
 816            f'{gpu_memory:.4f}',
 817            f'{gpu_cached:.4f}',
 818            int(has_nan),
 819            int(has_inf),
 820            int(has_zero),
 821            repair_action,
 822            f"{float(telemetry['gpu_temp_c']):.2f}",
 823            f"{float(telemetry['gpu_power_w']):.2f}",
 824            f"{float(telemetry['gpu_util_pct']):.2f}",
 825            f"{float(telemetry['gpu_mem_used_mib']):.2f}",
 826            f"{float(grad_buckets['embeddings']):.6f}",
 827            f"{float(grad_buckets['attention']):.6f}",
 828            f"{float(grad_buckets['ffn']):.6f}",
 829            f"{float(grad_buckets['experts']):.6f}",
 830            f"{float(grad_buckets['router']):.6f}",
 831            f"{float(grad_buckets['ode']):.6f}",
 832            f"{float(grad_buckets['retnet']):.6f}",
 833            f"{float(grad_buckets['mamba']):.6f}",
 834            f"{float(grad_buckets['norms']):.6f}",
 835            f"{float(grad_buckets['head']):.6f}",
 836            f"{float(grad_buckets['other']):.6f}",
 837            f"{float(step_time_ms):.2f}",
 838            f"{float(tokens_per_sec):.2f}",
 839            f"{float(clip_ratio):.6f}",
 840            int(effective_batch_size),
 841        ])
 842        self.csv_file.flush()
 843    
 844    def _check_for_nan(self, loss: torch.Tensor, step: int, batch: dict) -> bool:
 845        """Check if loss is NaN and log debug information if detected"""
 846        if not torch.isnan(loss) and not torch.isinf(loss):
 847            # Save last valid state for debugging
 848            if step % 50 == 0:  # Don't save every step for memory efficiency
 849                self.last_valid_state = {
 850                    'step': step,
 851                    'loss': loss.item(),
 852                    'scaler_scale': self.scaler.get_scale()
 853                }
 854            return False
 855        
 856        # NaN detected! Log comprehensive debug information
 857        self.nan_detected = True
 858        logging.error("=" * 80)
 859        logging.error("🚨 NaN/Inf DETECTED IN LOSS - STOPPING TRAINING 🚨")
 860        logging.error("=" * 80)
 861        
 862        logging.error(f"Step: {self.global_step}, Batch index: {step}")
 863        logging.error(f"Loss value: {loss.item()}")
 864        logging.error(f"Scaler scale: {self.scaler.get_scale()}")
 865        
 866        # Log last valid state
 867        if self.last_valid_state:
 868            logging.error(f"Last valid state: step={self.last_valid_state['step']}, "
 869                         f"loss={self.last_valid_state['loss']:.6f}, "
 870                         f"scale={self.last_valid_state['scaler_scale']}")
 871        
 872        # Log learning rates for each param group
 873        logging.error("Learning rates by parameter group:")
 874        for i, group in enumerate(self.optimizer.param_groups):
 875            name = group.get('name', f'group_{i}')
 876            logging.error(f"  {name}: lr={group['lr']:.8e}")
 877        
 878        # Check gradients
 879        logging.error("Gradient statistics by parameter:")
 880        nan_params = []
 881        inf_params = []
 882        large_grad_params = []
 883        
 884        for name, param in self.model.named_parameters():
 885            if param.grad is not None:
 886                grad = param.grad
 887                if torch.isnan(grad).any():
 888                    nan_params.append(name)
 889                elif torch.isinf(grad).any():
 890                    inf_params.append(name)
 891                else:
 892                    grad_max = grad.abs().max().item()
 893                    if grad_max > 1000:
 894                        large_grad_params.append((name, grad_max))
 895        
 896        if nan_params:
 897            logging.error(f"Parameters with NaN gradients ({len(nan_params)}):")
 898            for p in nan_params[:10]:  # Limit output
 899                logging.error(f"  - {p}")
 900        
 901        if inf_params:
 902            logging.error(f"Parameters with Inf gradients ({len(inf_params)}):")
 903            for p in inf_params[:10]:
 904                logging.error(f"  - {p}")
 905        
 906        if large_grad_params:
 907            logging.error(f"Parameters with large gradients (>1000) ({len(large_grad_params)}):")
 908            for name, val in sorted(large_grad_params, key=lambda x: -x[1])[:10]:
 909                logging.error(f"  - {name}: {val:.2f}")
 910        
 911        # Check model weights
 912        logging.error("Model weight statistics:")
 913        for name, param in self.model.named_parameters():
 914            if torch.isnan(param).any():
 915                logging.error(f"  NaN weights in: {name}")
 916            elif torch.isinf(param).any():
 917                logging.error(f"  Inf weights in: {name}")
 918        
 919        # Log input batch statistics
 920        logging.error("Input batch statistics:")
 921        for key, val in batch.items():
 922            if isinstance(val, torch.Tensor):
 923                logging.error(f"  {key}: shape={val.shape}, dtype={val.dtype}, "
 924                            f"min={val.min().item()}, max={val.max().item()}")
 925        
 926        # GPU memory state
 927        if torch.cuda.is_available():
 928            logging.error(f"GPU Memory - Allocated: {torch.cuda.memory_allocated()/1024**3:.2f}GB, "
 929                         f"Cached: {torch.cuda.memory_reserved()/1024**3:.2f}GB")
 930        
 931        # Log config that might affect stability
 932        logging.error("Model configuration (stability-relevant):")
 933        logging.error(f"  - BitNet enabled: {getattr(self.config, 'use_bitnet', 'n/a')}")
 934        logging.error(
 935            "  - ODE solver: %s, steps: %s",
 936            getattr(self.config, "ode_solver", "n/a"),
 937            getattr(self.config, "ode_steps", "n/a"),
 938        )
 939        logging.error(f"  - Layer pattern: {getattr(self.config, 'layer_pattern', 'n/a')}")
 940        logging.error(f"  - Num loops: {getattr(self.config, 'num_loops', 'n/a')}")
 941        logging.error(f"  - Dropout: {getattr(self.config, 'dropout', 'n/a')}")
 942        
 943        logging.error("=" * 80)
 944        
 945        return True
 946
 947    def _inspect_gradients(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
 948        """Inspect gradients right after backward for NaN/Inf/zero and global norm validity."""
 949        has_nan = False
 950        has_inf = False
 951        has_zero = False
 952        total_norm = 0.0
 953
 954        for param in self.model.parameters():
 955            if param.grad is None:
 956                continue
 957
 958            grad = param.grad
 959            if torch.isnan(grad).any():
 960                has_nan = True
 961            if torch.isinf(grad).any():
 962                has_inf = True
 963            if (grad == 0).all():
 964                has_zero = True
 965
 966            grad_norm = grad.norm().item()
 967            total_norm += grad_norm
 968
 969        if not torch.isfinite(torch.tensor(total_norm, device=self.device)):
 970            has_inf = True
 971
 972        if total_norm < self.training_config.min_grad_norm_for_signal:
 973            has_zero = True
 974
 975        return {
 976            "has_nan": has_nan,
 977            "has_inf": has_inf,
 978            "has_zero": has_zero,
 979            "total_norm": float(total_norm),
 980        }
 981
 982    def _apply_galore_projection(self):
 983        """Apply low-rank projection to gradients (GaLore-style) if enabled."""
 984        if not self.training_config.use_galore:
 985            return
 986        if self.global_step % max(int(self.training_config.galore_update_interval), 1) != 0:
 987            return
 988
 989        rank = max(int(self.training_config.galore_rank), 1)
 990        max_dim = int(self.training_config.galore_max_dim)
 991        scale = float(self.training_config.galore_scale)
 992
 993        for name, param in self.model.named_parameters():
 994            if param.grad is None:
 995                continue
 996            if param.grad.dim() != 2:
 997                continue
 998            if "bias" in name.lower() or "embed" in name.lower():
 999                continue
1000
1001            grad = param.grad
1002            rows, cols = grad.shape
1003            if min(rows, cols) < rank:
1004                continue
1005            if max(rows, cols) > max_dim:
1006                continue
1007
1008            try:
1009                u, s, vh = torch.linalg.svd(grad.float(), full_matrices=False)
1010            except RuntimeError:
1011                continue
1012
1013            u = u[:, :rank]
1014            s = s[:rank]
1015            vh = vh[:rank, :]
1016            approx = (u * s) @ vh
1017            grad.copy_(approx.to(dtype=grad.dtype) * scale)
1018
1019    def _scale_learning_rate(self, factor: float):
1020        """Scale all optimizer param-group learning rates by a multiplicative factor."""
1021        for group in self.optimizer.param_groups:
1022            group['lr'] = max(group['lr'] * factor, 1e-9)  # Lower floor to allow more aggressive reduction
1023    
1024    def _setup_optimizer(self) -> optim.Optimizer:
1025        """Setup optimizer with parameter groups for different components"""
1026        # Separate parameters by component type
1027        ode_params = []
1028        retnet_params = []
1029        mamba_params = []
1030        titan_attn_params = []
1031        norm_params = []
1032        embed_params = []
1033        other_params = []
1034        
1035        for name, param in self.model.named_parameters():
1036            if not param.requires_grad:
1037                continue
1038                
1039            if 'ode' in name.lower():
1040                ode_params.append(param)
1041            elif 'retention' in name.lower() or 'retnet' in name.lower():
1042                retnet_params.append(param)
1043            elif 'mamba' in name.lower():
1044                mamba_params.append(param)
1045            elif 'titan_attn' in name.lower() or 'attention' in name.lower():
1046                titan_attn_params.append(param)
1047            elif 'norm' in name.lower() or 'layer_norm' in name.lower():
1048                norm_params.append(param)
1049            elif 'embed' in name.lower():
1050                embed_params.append(param)
1051            else:
1052                other_params.append(param)
1053        
1054        param_groups = [
1055            {
1056                'params': embed_params,
1057                'lr': 1e-6,
1058                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1059                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1060                'eps': 1e-8,
1061                'name': 'embeddings'
1062            },
1063            {
1064                'params': norm_params,
1065                'lr': 5e-6,
1066                'weight_decay': 0.001,
1067                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1068                'eps': 1e-8,
1069                'name': 'norms'
1070            },
1071            {
1072                'params': ode_params,
1073                'lr': 1e-7,
1074                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1075                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1076                'eps': 1e-8,
1077                'name': 'ode'
1078            },
1079            {
1080                'params': retnet_params,
1081                'lr': 5e-6,
1082                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1083                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1084                'eps': 1e-8,
1085                'name': 'retnet'
1086            },
1087            {
1088                'params': mamba_params,
1089                'lr': 2e-6,
1090                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1091                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1092                'eps': 1e-8,
1093                'name': 'mamba'
1094            },
1095            {
1096                'params': titan_attn_params,
1097                'lr': 3e-6,
1098                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1099                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1100                'eps': 1e-8,
1101                'name': 'attention'
1102            },
1103            {
1104                'params': other_params,
1105                'lr': 2e-6,
1106                'weight_decay': 0.01,
1107                'betas': (0.9, 0.95),
1108                'eps': 1e-8,
1109                'name': 'other'
1110            }
1111        ]
1112        
1113        # Filter out empty groups
1114        param_groups = [group for group in param_groups if group['params']]
1115        
1116        # Log parameter distribution
1117        for group in param_groups:
1118            param_count = sum(p.numel() for p in group['params'])
1119            logging.info(f"Parameter group '{group['name']}': {param_count:,} parameters, lr={group['lr']}")
1120        
1121        optimizer = build_optimizer(
1122            optimizer_class=self.training_config.optimizer_class,
1123            param_groups=param_groups,
1124            parameters=self.training_config.optimizer_parameters,
1125        )
1126        logging.info(f"Using optimizer: {self.training_config.optimizer_class}")
1127        return optimizer
1128    
1129    def _setup_scheduler(self):
1130        """Setup learning rate scheduler with warmup"""
1131        total_steps = int(self.training_config.scheduler_total_steps)
1132        if total_steps <= 0:
1133            total_steps = 10000  # Estimated total steps
1134        warmup_ratio = float(self.training_config.scheduler_warmup_ratio)
1135        warmup_ratio = min(max(warmup_ratio, 0.0), 1.0)
1136        warmup_steps = int(warmup_ratio * total_steps)
1137        
1138        scheduler_type = str(self.training_config.scheduler_type).strip().lower()
1139
1140        def lr_lambda(step):
1141            if scheduler_type == "constant":
1142                return 1.0
1143            if scheduler_type == "linear_warmup_then_constant":
1144                if warmup_steps == 0:
1145                    return 1.0
1146                if step < warmup_steps:
1147                    return (step + 1) / warmup_steps
1148                return 1.0
1149            # cosine (default)
1150            if warmup_steps == 0:
1151                progress = step / max(total_steps, 1)
1152                progress = min(max(progress, 0.0), 1.0)
1153                return 0.5 * (1 + math.cos(math.pi * progress))
1154            if step < warmup_steps:
1155                return (step + 1) / warmup_steps
1156            progress = (step - warmup_steps) / max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1)
1157            progress = min(max(progress, 0.0), 1.0)
1158            return 0.5 * (1 + math.cos(math.pi * progress))
1159        
1160        return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(self.optimizer, lr_lambda)
1161    
1162    def _log_setup(self):
1163        """Log training setup information"""
1164        logging.info(f"🎯 Training on device: {self.device}")
1165        
1166        if torch.cuda.is_available():
1167            gpu_name = torch.cuda.get_device_name(0)
1168            gpu_memory = torch.cuda.get_device_properties(0).total_memory / 1e9
1169            logging.info(f"🔥 GPU: {gpu_name}")
1170            logging.info(f"💾 GPU Memory: {gpu_memory:.2f}GB")
1171            
1172            # Enable optimizations for P40
1173            torch.backends.cudnn.benchmark = True
1174            torch.backends.cudnn.allow_tf32 = True
1175        
1176        # Model-specific logging
1177        logging.info("🧠 Architecture: %s", self.model.__class__.__name__)
1178        logging.info(f"⚡ BitNet Quantization: {getattr(self.config, 'use_bitnet', 'n/a')}")
1179        logging.info(
1180            "🌊 ODE Solver: %s (%s steps)",
1181            getattr(self.config, "ode_solver", "n/a"),
1182            getattr(self.config, "ode_steps", "n/a"),
1183        )
1184        logging.info(f"🔄 Recursion Loops: {getattr(self.config, 'num_loops', 'n/a')}")
1185        logging.info(f"📐 Gradient Accumulation: {self.gradient_accumulation_steps} steps")
1186        if self.gpu_temp_guard.is_active:
1187            logging.info(
1188                "🌡️ GPU thermal guard enabled (pause>%.1fC, resume<=%.1fC, poll=%.1fs, critical=%s)",
1189                float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c),
1190                float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c),
1191                float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds),
1192                (
1193                    f"{float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c):.1f}C"
1194                    if self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c is not None
1195                    else "disabled"
1196                ),
1197            )
1198            if self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c is not None:
1199                logging.info(
1200                    "🌡️ Thermal critical offload enabled (critical>=%.1fC)",
1201                    float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c),
1202                )
1203            else:
1204                logging.info(
1205                    "🌡️ Thermal critical offload disabled (gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c is not set)"
1206                )
1207            logging.info(
1208                "🌡️ switch_on_thermal=%s",
1209                bool(self.training_config.switch_on_thermal),
1210            )
1211        else:
1212            logging.info("🌡️ GPU thermal guard disabled")
1213
1214    def _forward_mlm_logits(self, input_ids: torch.Tensor, attention_mask: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
1215        """Forward pass compatible with custom models and HF masked-LM outputs."""
1216        try:
1217            outputs = self.model(input_ids=input_ids, attention_mask=attention_mask)
1218        except TypeError:
1219            try:
1220                outputs = self.model(input_ids, attention_mask=attention_mask)
1221            except TypeError:
1222                outputs = self.model(input_ids)
1223
1224        if torch.is_tensor(outputs):
1225            return outputs
1226        if isinstance(outputs, dict):
1227            logits = outputs.get("logits")
1228            if logits is not None:
1229                return logits
1230        if hasattr(outputs, "logits"):
1231            return outputs.logits
1232
1233        raise RuntimeError(
1234            "Model forward output does not include MLM logits. "
1235            "Expected tensor, dict['logits'], or object.logits."
1236        )
1237    
1238    def compute_mlm_loss(self, input_ids, attention_mask, labels):
1239        """Compute masked language modeling loss with shape safety checks.
1240
1241        Handles both HF-style labels (``-100`` on unmasked tokens) and
1242        raw-sequence labels (infers masked positions by comparing input
1243        and label token IDs). Includes a fallback that forces at least one
1244        valid supervised token when no MLM targets exist.
1245
1246        Args:
1247            input_ids: Token ID tensor of shape ``(B, S)``.
1248            attention_mask: Attention mask tensor of shape ``(B, S)``.
1249            labels: Label tensor of shape ``(B, S)``.
1250
1251        Returns:
1252            Tuple of ``(loss, accuracy)`` where ``loss`` is a scalar tensor
1253            and ``accuracy`` is a scalar tensor in ``[0, 1]``.
1254
1255        Raises:
1256            RuntimeError: If non-finite logits are detected, or if tensor
1257                shapes are mismatched.
1258        """
1259        # Forward pass
1260        logits = self._forward_mlm_logits(input_ids, attention_mask)
1261        auxiliary_losses = getattr(self.model, "last_auxiliary_losses", None)
1262
1263        # Safety: avoid propagating non-finite logits into CE (would yield NaN loss)
1264        if not torch.isfinite(logits).all():
1265            bad = (~torch.isfinite(logits)).sum().item()
1266            raise RuntimeError(f"Non-finite logits detected in forward pass: {bad} elements")
1267        
1268        # Reshape for loss computation
1269        batch_size, seq_len, vocab_size = logits.shape
1270        
1271        # CRITICAL: Ensure all tensors have matching shapes before flattening
1272        # Variable sequence lengths can cause shape mismatches
1273        if labels.shape != input_ids.shape:
1274            raise RuntimeError(f"Shape mismatch: labels {labels.shape} != input_ids {input_ids.shape}")
1275        if attention_mask.shape != input_ids.shape:
1276            raise RuntimeError(f"Shape mismatch: attention_mask {attention_mask.shape} != input_ids {input_ids.shape}")
1277        
1278        logits = logits.view(-1, vocab_size)
1279        labels = labels.view(-1)
1280        input_flat = input_ids.view(-1)
1281        attn_flat = attention_mask.view(-1)
1282        
1283        # Support both label conventions:
1284        # 1) labels already contain -100 on unmasked tokens (HF-style)
1285        # 2) labels contain full original sequence; infer masked positions by input!=label
1286        if (labels == -100).any():
1287            mlm_labels = labels.clone()
1288        else:
1289            mlm_labels = labels.clone()
1290            mlm_labels[labels == input_flat] = -100
1291
1292        valid_mask = (mlm_labels != -100)
1293
1294        # Rare fallback: if no valid MLM targets exist, force one valid supervised token
1295        # from attended positions to keep CE finite and training alive.
1296        if valid_mask.sum().item() == 0:
1297            candidate_positions = torch.nonzero(attn_flat > 0, as_tuple=False)
1298            if candidate_positions.numel() > 0:
1299                first_idx = int(candidate_positions[0].item())
1300                mlm_labels[first_idx] = labels[first_idx]
1301                valid_mask = (mlm_labels != -100)
1302
1303        # Compute CE in float32 for numerical stability
1304        if valid_mask.sum().item() > 0:
1305            loss = F.cross_entropy(logits[valid_mask].float(), mlm_labels[valid_mask])
1306        else:
1307            # Defensive fallback (should almost never happen after forced target above)
1308            loss = logits.new_zeros((), requires_grad=True)
1309
1310        if isinstance(auxiliary_losses, dict):
1311            for aux_name, aux_loss in auxiliary_losses.items():
1312                if torch.is_tensor(aux_loss) and aux_loss.requires_grad:
1313                    if not torch.isfinite(aux_loss):
1314                        raise RuntimeError(
1315                            f"Non-finite auxiliary loss detected for {aux_name} during forward pass"
1316                        )
1317                    loss = loss + aux_loss
1318        
1319        # Compute accuracy on masked tokens
1320        with torch.no_grad():
1321            mask = valid_mask
1322            if mask.any():
1323                predictions = logits.argmax(dim=-1)
1324                correct = (predictions == mlm_labels) & mask
1325                accuracy = correct.sum().float() / mask.sum().float()
1326            else:
1327                accuracy = torch.tensor(0.0, device=logits.device)
1328        
1329        return loss, accuracy
1330    
1331    def train_epoch(self, dataloader: DataLoader, epoch: int) -> Tuple[float, bool]:
1332        """
1333        Train for one epoch with advanced monitoring.
1334        
1335        Returns:
1336            Tuple[float, bool]: (average_loss, should_stop)
1337            should_stop is True if NaN was detected
1338        """
1339        self.model.train()
1340        total_loss = 0.0
1341        total_accuracy = 0.0
1342        num_batches = 0
1343        grad_norm = 0.0
1344        self.current_epoch_had_inf = False
1345        current_epoch_had_zero = False
1346        
1347        # Progress bar with detailed metrics
1348        progress_bar = tqdm(
1349            dataloader, 
1350            desc=f"🚀 Epoch {epoch+1}",
1351            leave=True,
1352            ncols=120
1353        )
1354        epoch_started = time.perf_counter()
1355        
1356        self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1357        optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1358        
1359        for batch_idx, batch in enumerate(progress_bar):
1360            try:
1361                thermal_action = self._enforce_thermal_guard(epoch, batch_idx)
1362                if thermal_action != "none":
1363                    self._pending_thermal_repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1364                        self._pending_thermal_repair_action,
1365                        thermal_action,
1366                    )
1367                # Move to device
1368                batch = {k: v.to(self.device, non_blocking=True) for k, v in batch.items()}
1369                repair_action = self._pending_thermal_repair_action
1370                retry_count = 0
1371                batch_done = False
1372                amp_enabled = self.use_amp and str(self.device).startswith("cuda")
1373
1374                while retry_count <= self.training_config.max_nan_retries and not batch_done:
1375                    # Forward pass (AMP if enabled)
1376                    with autocast(self.device, enabled=amp_enabled, dtype=self.amp_dtype):
1377                        loss, accuracy = self.compute_mlm_loss(
1378                            batch['input_ids'],
1379                            batch['attention_mask'],
1380                            batch['labels']
1381                        )
1382
1383                        if self._check_for_nan(loss * self.gradient_accumulation_steps, batch_idx, batch):
1384                            repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1385                                repair_action,
1386                                f"nan_loss_retry_{retry_count + 1}",
1387                            )
1388                            self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1389                            self._scale_learning_rate(0.5)
1390                            retry_count += 1
1391
1392                            if retry_count > self.training_config.max_nan_retries:
1393                                try:
1394                                    emergency_path = self.save_checkpoint(epoch, suffix="_nan_emergency")
1395                                    logging.error(f"Emergency checkpoint saved: {emergency_path}")
1396                                except Exception as e:
1397                                    logging.error(f"Failed to save emergency checkpoint: {e}")
1398                                return total_loss / max(num_batches, 1), True
1399                            continue
1400
1401                        raw_loss = loss.item()
1402                        scaled_loss = loss / self.gradient_accumulation_steps
1403
1404                    # Backward pass
1405                    if amp_enabled:
1406                        self.scaler.scale(scaled_loss).backward()
1407                    else:
1408                        scaled_loss.backward()
1409
1410                    grad_stats = self._inspect_gradients()
1411                    current_epoch_had_zero = current_epoch_had_zero or grad_stats["has_zero"]
1412
1413                    # Repair policy for NaN gradients: skip step, zero grad, LR*0.75 retry up to N times
1414                    if grad_stats["has_nan"]:
1415                        repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1416                            repair_action,
1417                            f"nan_grad_retry_{retry_count + 1}",
1418                        )
1419                        self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1420                        self._scale_learning_rate(0.75)  # Less aggressive reduction (was 0.5)
1421                        retry_count += 1
1422
1423                        if retry_count > self.training_config.max_nan_retries:
1424                            logging.error(
1425                                "NaN gradients persisted after retries. Saving checkpoint and stopping training."
1426                            )
1427                            try:
1428                                emergency_path = self.save_checkpoint(epoch, suffix="_nan_grad_emergency")
1429                                logging.error(f"Emergency checkpoint saved: {emergency_path}")
1430                            except Exception as e:
1431                                logging.error(f"Failed to save emergency checkpoint: {e}")
1432                            return total_loss / max(num_batches, 1), True
1433                        continue
1434
1435                    # Update every gradient_accumulation_steps
1436                    if (batch_idx + 1) % self.gradient_accumulation_steps == 0:
