1437                        if amp_enabled:
1438                            self.scaler.unscale_(self.optimizer)
1439
1440                        self._apply_galore_projection()
1441
1442                        grad_norm = clip_grad_norm_(
1443                            self.model.parameters(),
1444                            max_norm=self.training_config.grad_clip_max_norm
1445                        )
1446                        grad_norm_value = grad_norm.item() if isinstance(grad_norm, torch.Tensor) else float(grad_norm)
1447                        clip_ratio = grad_norm_value / max(float(self.training_config.grad_clip_max_norm), 1e-12)
1448
1449                        telemetry_interval = max(int(self.training_config.telemetry_log_interval), 1)
1450                        should_log_heavy = ((self.global_step + 1) % telemetry_interval == 0)
1451                        gpu_telemetry = (
1452                            self._get_gpu_telemetry()
1453                            if should_log_heavy
1454                            else self._get_default_gpu_telemetry()
1455                        )
1456                        gpu_telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(gpu_telemetry)
1457                        block_grad_norms = (
1458                            self._collect_block_grad_norms()
1459                            if should_log_heavy
1460                            else self._get_default_block_grad_norms()
1461                        )
1462                        step_time_ms = (time.perf_counter() - optimizer_window_start) * 1000.0
1463                        effective_batch_size = int(batch['input_ids'].shape[0]) * self.gradient_accumulation_steps
1464                        token_count = effective_batch_size * int(batch['input_ids'].shape[1])
1465                        tokens_per_sec = float(token_count) / max(step_time_ms / 1000.0, 1e-9)
1466
1467                        post_clip_bad = (not math.isfinite(grad_norm_value)) or (
1468                            grad_norm_value > self.training_config.inf_post_clip_threshold
1469                        )
1470
1471                        # Repair policy for Inf/exploding gradients
1472                        if grad_stats["has_inf"] or post_clip_bad:
1473                            self.current_epoch_had_inf = True
1474                            repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1475                                repair_action,
1476                                "inf_skip_step_lr_half",
1477                            )
1478                            self._scale_learning_rate(0.5)
1479
1480                            self.global_step += 1
1481                            current_lr = self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]
1482                            self._log_step_to_csv(
1483                                epoch=epoch,
1484                                step=batch_idx,
1485                                loss=raw_loss,
1486                                accuracy=accuracy.item(),
1487                                lr=current_lr,
1488                                grad_norm=grad_norm_value,
1489                                has_nan=grad_stats["has_nan"],
1490                                has_inf=True,
1491                                has_zero=grad_stats["has_zero"],
1492                                repair_action=repair_action,
1493                                gpu_telemetry=gpu_telemetry,
1494                                block_grad_norms=block_grad_norms,
1495                                step_time_ms=step_time_ms,
1496                                tokens_per_sec=tokens_per_sec,
1497                                clip_ratio=clip_ratio,
1498                                effective_batch_size=effective_batch_size,
1499                            )
1500                            self._pending_thermal_repair_action = "none"
1501                            self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1502                            optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1503                            batch_done = True
1504                            continue
1505
1506                        # Normal optimizer step
1507                        if amp_enabled:
1508                            self.scaler.step(self.optimizer)
1509                            self.scaler.update()
1510                        else:
1511                            self.optimizer.step()
1512
1513                        self.scheduler.step()
1514                        self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1515
1516                        self.global_step += 1
1517                        current_lr = self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]
1518                        self._log_step_to_csv(
1519                            epoch=epoch,
1520                            step=batch_idx,
1521                            loss=raw_loss,
1522                            accuracy=accuracy.item(),
1523                            lr=current_lr,
1524                            grad_norm=grad_norm_value,
1525                            has_nan=grad_stats["has_nan"],
1526                            has_inf=grad_stats["has_inf"],
1527                            has_zero=grad_stats["has_zero"],
1528                            repair_action=repair_action,
1529                            gpu_telemetry=gpu_telemetry,
1530                            block_grad_norms=block_grad_norms,
1531                            step_time_ms=step_time_ms,
1532                            tokens_per_sec=tokens_per_sec,
1533                            clip_ratio=clip_ratio,
1534                            effective_batch_size=effective_batch_size,
1535                        )
1536                        self._pending_thermal_repair_action = "none"
1537                        optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1538
1539                        if self.global_step % self.training_config.checkpoint_every_n_steps == 0:
1540                            self._save_rolling_checkpoint(epoch)
1541
1542                        self._maybe_save_best_checkpoint(epoch, raw_loss)
1543
1544                    # Accumulate metrics
1545                    total_loss += raw_loss
1546                    total_accuracy += accuracy.item()
1547                    num_batches += 1
1548                    batch_done = True
1549
1550                if not batch_done:
1551                    return total_loss / max(num_batches, 1), True
1552                
1553                # Update progress bar
1554                current_lr = self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]
1555                progress_bar.set_postfix({
1556                    'loss': f'{(total_loss / max(num_batches, 1)):.4f}',
1557                    'acc': f'{accuracy.item():.3f}',
1558                    'lr': f'{current_lr:.2e}',
1559                    'step': self.global_step
1560                })
1561                
1562                # Memory management every 50 steps
1563                if batch_idx % 50 == 0 and torch.cuda.is_available():
1564                    torch.cuda.empty_cache()
1565                
1566                # Detailed logging every 100 steps
1567                if batch_idx % 100 == 0 and batch_idx > 0:
1568                    avg_loss = total_loss / num_batches
1569                    avg_acc = total_accuracy / num_batches
1570                    progress_snapshot = tqdm.format_meter(
1571                        batch_idx + 1,
1572                        len(dataloader),
1573                        time.perf_counter() - epoch_started,
1574                    )
1575                    logging.info("Progress %s", progress_snapshot)
1576                    
1577                    if torch.cuda.is_available():
1578                        memory_used = torch.cuda.memory_allocated() / 1024**3
1579                        memory_cached = torch.cuda.memory_reserved() / 1024**3
1580                        logging.info(
1581                            f"Step {self.global_step}: Loss={avg_loss:.4f}, "
1582                            f"Acc={avg_acc:.3f}, GPU={memory_used:.2f}GB"
1583                        )
1584                
1585            except RuntimeError as e:
1586                if isinstance(e, GPUTelemetryError):
1587                    telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(self._get_default_gpu_telemetry())
1588                    self._log_step_to_csv(
1589                        epoch=epoch,
1590                        step=batch_idx,
1591                        loss=float("nan"),
1592                        accuracy=0.0,
1593                        lr=self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0],
1594                        grad_norm=0.0,
1595                        has_nan=False,
1596                        has_inf=True,
1597                        has_zero=False,
1598                        repair_action="telemetry_fatal_stop",
1599                        gpu_telemetry=telemetry,
1600                        block_grad_norms=self._get_default_block_grad_norms(),
1601                        step_time_ms=0.0,
1602                        tokens_per_sec=0.0,
1603                        clip_ratio=0.0,
1604                        effective_batch_size=0,
1605                    )
1606                    logging.error(
1607                        "Fatal GPU telemetry error at batch %s: %s. Stopping training immediately.",
1608                        batch_idx,
1609                        e,
1610                    )
1611                    raise
1612                if self._switch_to_cpu_only_after_gpu_error(exc=e, epoch=epoch, batch_idx=batch_idx):
1613                    telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(self._get_default_gpu_telemetry())
1614                    self._log_step_to_csv(
1615                        epoch=epoch,
1616                        step=batch_idx,
1617                        loss=float("nan"),
1618                        accuracy=0.0,
1619                        lr=self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0],
1620                        grad_norm=0.0,
1621                        has_nan=False,
1622                        has_inf=True,
1623                        has_zero=False,
1624                        repair_action="thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error",
1625                        gpu_telemetry=telemetry,
1626                        block_grad_norms=self._get_default_block_grad_norms(),
1627                        step_time_ms=0.0,
1628                        tokens_per_sec=0.0,
1629                        clip_ratio=0.0,
1630                        effective_batch_size=0,
1631                    )
1632                    self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1633                    self._pending_thermal_repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1634                        self._pending_thermal_repair_action,
1635                        "thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error",
1636                    )
1637                    optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1638                    continue
1639                if "out of memory" in str(e):
1640                    telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(self._get_default_gpu_telemetry())
1641                    self._log_step_to_csv(
1642                        epoch=epoch,
1643                        step=batch_idx,
1644                        loss=float("nan"),
1645                        accuracy=0.0,
1646                        lr=self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0],
1647                        grad_norm=0.0,
1648                        has_nan=False,
1649                        has_inf=False,
1650                        has_zero=False,
1651                        repair_action="oom_skip_batch",
1652                        gpu_telemetry=telemetry,
1653                        block_grad_norms=self._get_default_block_grad_norms(),
1654                        step_time_ms=0.0,
1655                        tokens_per_sec=0.0,
1656                        clip_ratio=0.0,
1657                        effective_batch_size=0,
1658                    )
1659                    logging.error(f"OOM at batch {batch_idx}, clearing cache and continuing...")
1660                    if torch.cuda.is_available():
1661                        torch.cuda.empty_cache()
1662                    self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1663                    continue
1664                else:
1665                    raise e
1666        
1667        # Final epoch metrics
1668        avg_loss = total_loss / max(num_batches, 1)
1669        avg_accuracy = total_accuracy / max(num_batches, 1)
1670        
1671        # Update best loss / plateau tracking
1672        if avg_loss < self.best_loss:
1673            self.best_loss = avg_loss
1674            self.non_improving_epochs = 0
1675            logging.info(f"🎉 New best loss: {self.best_loss:.4f}")
1676        else:
1677            self.non_improving_epochs += 1
1678
1679        if self.current_epoch_had_inf:
1680            self.consecutive_inf_epochs += 1
1681        else:
1682            self.consecutive_inf_epochs = 0
1683
1684        if current_epoch_had_zero and self.non_improving_epochs >= self.training_config.zero_grad_plateau_patience:
1685            self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs += 1
1686        else:
1687            self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs = 0
1688        
1689        logging.info(
1690            f"📊 Epoch {epoch+1} Summary: "
1691            f"Loss={avg_loss:.4f}, Accuracy={avg_accuracy:.3f}, "
1692            f"Best Loss={self.best_loss:.4f}, "
1693            f"InfEpochs={self.consecutive_inf_epochs}, "
1694            f"ZeroGradPlateauEpochs={self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs}"
1695        )
1696
1697        # Early stop policy: unrecoverable exploding gradients across epochs
1698        if self.consecutive_inf_epochs > self.training_config.inf_epoch_patience:
1699            logging.error(
1700                "Early stop: Inf/exploding gradients persisted for too many consecutive epochs."
1701            )
1702            return avg_loss, True
1703
1704        # Early stop policy: vanishing gradients + plateau persistence
1705        if self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs >= 1:
1706            logging.error(
1707                "Early stop: persistent near-zero gradients with plateaued loss detected."
1708            )
1709            return avg_loss, True
1710        
1711        return avg_loss, False  # No NaN detected
1712    
1713    def _save_rolling_checkpoint(self, epoch: int, path: str = "checkpoints"):
1714        """Save a rolling checkpoint and manage the queue"""
1715        os.makedirs(path, exist_ok=True)
1716        
1717        filename = f"titan_rolling_step_{self.global_step}.pt"
1718        checkpoint_path = os.path.join(path, filename)
1719        
1720        checkpoint = {
1721            'epoch': epoch,
1722            'global_step': self.global_step,
1723            'model_state_dict': self.model.state_dict(),
1724            'optimizer_state_dict': self.optimizer.state_dict(),
1725            'scheduler_state_dict': self.scheduler.state_dict(),
1726            'scaler_state_dict': self.scaler.state_dict(),
1727            'config': self.config,
1728            'best_loss': self.best_loss,
1729            'model_class': self.model.__class__.__name__
1730        }
1731        
1732        torch.save(checkpoint, checkpoint_path)
1733        logging.info(f"💾 Rolling checkpoint saved: {checkpoint_path}")
1734        
1735        # Add to queue
1736        self.rolling_checkpoints.append(checkpoint_path)
1737        
1738        # Remove old checkpoints if exceeding max
1739        while len(self.rolling_checkpoints) > self.training_config.max_rolling_checkpoints:
1740            old_checkpoint = self.rolling_checkpoints.pop(0)
1741            try:
1742                if os.path.exists(old_checkpoint):
1743                    os.remove(old_checkpoint)
1744                    logging.info(f"🗑️ Removed old rolling checkpoint: {old_checkpoint}")
1745            except Exception as e:
1746                logging.warning(f"Failed to remove old checkpoint {old_checkpoint}: {e}")
1747    
1748    def _maybe_save_best_checkpoint(self, epoch: int, current_loss: float, path: str = "checkpoints"):
1749        """Save checkpoint if it's among the top K best models"""
1750        os.makedirs(path, exist_ok=True)
1751        
1752        k = self.training_config.num_best_checkpoints
1753        
1754        # Use negative loss because heapq is a min-heap
1755        # We want to keep the K smallest losses (best models)
1756        should_save = False
1757        
1758        if len(self.best_checkpoints) < k:
1759            should_save = True
1760        elif current_loss < -self.best_checkpoints[0][0]:  # Compare with worst of the best
1761            should_save = True
1762        
1763        if should_save:
1764            filename = f"titan_best_loss_{current_loss:.6f}_step_{self.global_step}.pt"
1765            checkpoint_path = os.path.join(path, filename)
1766            
1767            checkpoint = {
1768                'epoch': epoch,
1769                'global_step': self.global_step,
1770                'model_state_dict': self.model.state_dict(),
1771                'optimizer_state_dict': self.optimizer.state_dict(),
1772                'scheduler_state_dict': self.scheduler.state_dict(),
1773                'scaler_state_dict': self.scaler.state_dict(),
1774                'config': self.config,
1775                'best_loss': current_loss,
1776                'model_class': self.model.__class__.__name__
1777            }
1778            
1779            torch.save(checkpoint, checkpoint_path)
1780            logging.info(f"⭐ Best model checkpoint saved: {checkpoint_path} (loss={current_loss:.6f})")
1781            
1782            # Add to heap (using negative loss for min-heap to act as max-heap)
1783            heapq.heappush(self.best_checkpoints, (-current_loss, checkpoint_path))
1784            
1785            # Remove worst of the best if exceeding K
1786            if len(self.best_checkpoints) > k:
1787                _, removed_path = heapq.heappop(self.best_checkpoints)
1788                try:
1789                    if os.path.exists(removed_path):
1790                        os.remove(removed_path)
1791                        logging.info(f"🗑️ Removed replaced best checkpoint: {removed_path}")
1792                except Exception as e:
1793                    logging.warning(f"Failed to remove old best checkpoint {removed_path}: {e}")
1794    
1795    def close(self):
1796        """Cleanup resources"""
1797        if self.csv_file:
1798            self.csv_file.close()
1799            logging.info(f"📊 CSV log closed: {self.training_config.csv_log_path}")
1800    
1801    def save_checkpoint(self, epoch: int, suffix: str = "", path: str = "checkpoints") -> str:
1802        """Save a comprehensive training checkpoint.
1803
1804        Includes model state, optimizer state, scheduler state, AMP scaler
1805        state, config, global step, and best loss.
1806
1807        Args:
1808            epoch: Current epoch number.
1809            suffix: Optional filename suffix (e.g. ``"_epoch_end"``).
1810            path: Directory to save the checkpoint in.
1811
1812        Returns:
1813            Absolute path to the saved checkpoint file.
1814        """
1815        os.makedirs(path, exist_ok=True)
1816        
1817        checkpoint = {
1818            'epoch': epoch,
1819            'global_step': self.global_step,
1820            'model_state_dict': self.model.state_dict(),
1821            'optimizer_state_dict': self.optimizer.state_dict(),
1822            'scheduler_state_dict': self.scheduler.state_dict(),
1823            'scaler_state_dict': self.scaler.state_dict(),
1824            'config': self.config,
1825            'best_loss': self.best_loss,
1826            'model_class': self.model.__class__.__name__
1827        }
1828        
1829        filename = f"titan_checkpoint_epoch_{epoch}{suffix}.pt"
1830        checkpoint_path = os.path.join(path, filename)
1831        
1832        torch.save(checkpoint, checkpoint_path)
1833        
1834        # Register with storage manager
1835        if self.storage_manager.register_file(checkpoint_path):
1836            logging.info(f"💾 Checkpoint saved: {checkpoint_path}")
1837        else:
1838            logging.warning(f"⚠️ Checkpoint saved but storage limit warning")
1839        
1840        return checkpoint_path
1841    
1842    def load_checkpoint(self, checkpoint_path: str):
1843        """Load a checkpoint and resume training state.
1844
1845        Restores model weights, optimizer state, scheduler state, AMP
1846        scaler state, global step, and best loss.
1847
1848        Args:
1849            checkpoint_path: Path to the checkpoint file.
1850
1851        Returns:
1852            The epoch number from the loaded checkpoint.
1853        """
1854        logging.info(f"📂 Loading checkpoint: {checkpoint_path}")
1855        
1856        checkpoint = torch.load(checkpoint_path, map_location=self.device)
1857        
1858        self.model.load_state_dict(checkpoint['model_state_dict'])
1859        self.optimizer.load_state_dict(checkpoint['optimizer_state_dict'])
1860        self.scheduler.load_state_dict(checkpoint['scheduler_state_dict'])
1861        self.scaler.load_state_dict(checkpoint['scaler_state_dict'])
1862        
1863        self.global_step = checkpoint['global_step']
1864        self.best_loss = checkpoint['best_loss']
1865        
1866        logging.info(f"✅ Checkpoint loaded - Global Step: {self.global_step}, Best Loss: {self.best_loss:.4f}")
1867        
1868        return checkpoint['epoch']
1869
1870    def save_pretrained_artifacts(self, output_dir: str, tokenizer: Any = None):
1871        """Save HuggingFace-compatible model and tokenizer artifacts.
1872
1873        Args:
1874            output_dir: Directory to save artifacts in.
1875            tokenizer: Optional tokenizer with ``save_pretrained`` support.
1876
1877        Raises:
1878            RuntimeError: If the model does not support ``save_pretrained``.
1879        """
1880        if not hasattr(self.model, "save_pretrained"):
1881            raise RuntimeError("Current model does not support save_pretrained")
1882
1883        os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
1884        self.model.save_pretrained(output_dir)
1885        logging.info("💾 Saved model with save_pretrained: %s", output_dir)
1886
1887        if tokenizer is not None and hasattr(tokenizer, "save_pretrained"):
1888            tokenizer.save_pretrained(output_dir)
1889            logging.info("💾 Saved tokenizer with save_pretrained: %s", output_dir)

Advanced trainer for TORMENTED-BERT-Frankenstein with stability controls.

Implements a production-grade training loop with gradient accumulation, automatic mixed precision (AMP), gradient clipping, NaN detection with automatic retry and learning rate scaling, rolling and best-loss checkpointing, GPU thermal guard integration, GaLore low-rank gradient projection, and CSV telemetry logging.

Attributes:
  • model: The PyTorch model being trained.
  • config: Model configuration (UltraConfig or HF config).
  • training_config: TrainingConfig with stability parameters.
  • device: Resolved PyTorch device string.
  • optimizer: Configured optimizer with per-component parameter groups.
  • scaler: AMP gradient scaler.
  • scheduler: Learning rate scheduler with warmup.
  • storage_manager: StorageManager for disk usage tracking.
  • global_step: Current global training step counter.
  • best_loss: Best (lowest) loss observed so far.
  • gradient_accumulation_steps: Number of steps between optimizer updates.
  • gpu_temp_guard: GPUTemperatureGuard for thermal safety.
TitanTrainer( model: torch.nn.modules.module.Module, config: Any | None, training_config: TrainingConfig = None, device: str = None) 
174    def __init__(self, model: torch.nn.Module, config: Optional[Any],
175                 training_config: TrainingConfig = None,
176                 device: str = None): #torch.device = None):
177        """Initialize the trainer.
178
179        Args:
180            model: PyTorch model to train.
181            config: Model configuration object (e.g. :class:`UltraConfig`).
182            training_config: :class:`TrainingConfig` with stability and
183                checkpointing parameters. Uses defaults if ``None``.
184            device: Target device string. Defaults to CUDA if available,
185                otherwise CPU.
186        """
187        self.model = model
188        self.config = config
189        self.training_config = training_config or TrainingConfig()
190        self.device = device if device else ("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
191        self._primary_device = str(self.device)
192        if (
193            self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c is not None
194            and self._primary_device.startswith("cuda")
195        ):
196            self.training_config.switch_on_thermal = True
197        self._configured_use_amp = bool(self.training_config.use_amp)
198        self.use_amp = (
199            self._configured_use_amp
200            and torch.cuda.is_available()
201            and self._primary_device.startswith("cuda")
202        )
203        self.amp_dtype = torch.float16
204        if self.use_amp and torch.cuda.is_bf16_supported():
205            self.amp_dtype = torch.bfloat16
206        self.model.to(self.device)
207        
208        # Specialized optimizer for hybrid architecture
209        self.optimizer = self._setup_optimizer()
210        
211        # Mixed precision with aggressive scaling for BitNet
212        self.scaler = GradScaler(
213            self.device,
214            init_scale=2.**10,  # Lower initial scale for BitNet stability
215            growth_factor=1.5,  # Conservative growth
216            backoff_factor=0.8,
217            growth_interval=100
218        )
219        
220        # Learning rate scheduler with warmup for ODE dynamics
221        self.scheduler = self._setup_scheduler()
222        
223        # Storage monitoring
224        self.storage_manager = StorageManager()
225        
226        # Training state tracking
227        self.global_step = 0
228        self.best_loss = float('inf')
229        
230        # Gradient accumulation for effective larger batches
231        self.gradient_accumulation_steps = max(int(self.training_config.gradient_accumulation_steps), 1)
232        
233        # === NEW: CSV Logger ===
234        self.csv_file = None
235        self.csv_writer = None
236        self.csv_columns = self._get_csv_columns()
237
238        # Optional NVML state (best-effort telemetry)
239        self._nvml_module = None
240        self._nvml_handle = None
241        self._nvml_disabled = False
242        self._nvml_warning_logged = False
243        self._last_guard_temp_c: Optional[float] = None
244        self._pending_thermal_repair_action = "none"
245        self._thermal_offload_active = False
246        self._thermal_offload_started_monotonic: Optional[float] = None
247        self._thermal_last_poll_monotonic = 0.0
248        self._thermal_emergency_last_checkpoint: Optional[str] = None
249        self._force_cpu_only_after_gpu_error = False
250        self.gpu_temp_guard = GPUTemperatureGuard(
251            enabled=bool(self.training_config.gpu_temp_guard_enabled),
252            device=str(self.device),
253            nvml_device_index=int(self.training_config.nvml_device_index),
254            pause_threshold_c=float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_pause_threshold_c),
255            resume_threshold_c=float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_resume_threshold_c),
256            critical_threshold_c=self.training_config.gpu_temp_critical_threshold_c,
257            poll_interval_seconds=float(self.training_config.gpu_temp_poll_interval_seconds),
258        )
259
260        self._init_csv_logger()
261        
262        # === NEW: Rolling checkpoint tracking ===
263        self.rolling_checkpoints: List[str] = []  # FIFO queue of checkpoint paths
264        self.thermal_emergency_checkpoints: List[str] = []
265        
266        # === NEW: Best checkpoints tracking (min-heap by negative loss for max extraction) ===
267        # Format: [(-loss, checkpoint_path), ...]
268        self.best_checkpoints: List[Tuple[float, str]] = []
269        
270        # === NEW: NaN detection state ===
271        self.nan_detected = False
272        self.last_valid_state = None  # For debugging
273
274        # Stability / early-stop state
275        self.current_epoch_had_inf = False
276        self.consecutive_inf_epochs = 0
277        self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs = 0
278        self.non_improving_epochs = 0
279        
280        self._log_setup()

Initialize the trainer.

Arguments:
  • model: PyTorch model to train.
  • config: Model configuration object (e.g. UltraConfig).
  • training_config: TrainingConfig with stability and checkpointing parameters. Uses defaults if None.
  • device: Target device string. Defaults to CUDA if available, otherwise CPU.
model
config
training_config
device
use_amp
amp_dtype
optimizer
scaler
scheduler
storage_manager
global_step
best_loss
gradient_accumulation_steps
csv_file
csv_writer
csv_columns
gpu_temp_guard
rolling_checkpoints: List[str]
thermal_emergency_checkpoints: List[str]
best_checkpoints: List[Tuple[float, str]]
nan_detected
last_valid_state
current_epoch_had_inf
consecutive_inf_epochs
consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs
non_improving_epochs
def compute_mlm_loss(self, input_ids, attention_mask, labels): 
1238    def compute_mlm_loss(self, input_ids, attention_mask, labels):
1239        """Compute masked language modeling loss with shape safety checks.
1240
1241        Handles both HF-style labels (``-100`` on unmasked tokens) and
1242        raw-sequence labels (infers masked positions by comparing input
1243        and label token IDs). Includes a fallback that forces at least one
1244        valid supervised token when no MLM targets exist.
1245
1246        Args:
1247            input_ids: Token ID tensor of shape ``(B, S)``.
1248            attention_mask: Attention mask tensor of shape ``(B, S)``.
1249            labels: Label tensor of shape ``(B, S)``.
1250
1251        Returns:
1252            Tuple of ``(loss, accuracy)`` where ``loss`` is a scalar tensor
1253            and ``accuracy`` is a scalar tensor in ``[0, 1]``.
1254
1255        Raises:
1256            RuntimeError: If non-finite logits are detected, or if tensor
1257                shapes are mismatched.
1258        """
1259        # Forward pass
1260        logits = self._forward_mlm_logits(input_ids, attention_mask)
1261        auxiliary_losses = getattr(self.model, "last_auxiliary_losses", None)
1262
1263        # Safety: avoid propagating non-finite logits into CE (would yield NaN loss)
1264        if not torch.isfinite(logits).all():
1265            bad = (~torch.isfinite(logits)).sum().item()
1266            raise RuntimeError(f"Non-finite logits detected in forward pass: {bad} elements")
1267        
1268        # Reshape for loss computation
1269        batch_size, seq_len, vocab_size = logits.shape
1270        
1271        # CRITICAL: Ensure all tensors have matching shapes before flattening
1272        # Variable sequence lengths can cause shape mismatches
1273        if labels.shape != input_ids.shape:
1274            raise RuntimeError(f"Shape mismatch: labels {labels.shape} != input_ids {input_ids.shape}")
1275        if attention_mask.shape != input_ids.shape:
1276            raise RuntimeError(f"Shape mismatch: attention_mask {attention_mask.shape} != input_ids {input_ids.shape}")
1277        
1278        logits = logits.view(-1, vocab_size)
1279        labels = labels.view(-1)
1280        input_flat = input_ids.view(-1)
1281        attn_flat = attention_mask.view(-1)
1282        
1283        # Support both label conventions:
1284        # 1) labels already contain -100 on unmasked tokens (HF-style)
1285        # 2) labels contain full original sequence; infer masked positions by input!=label
1286        if (labels == -100).any():
1287            mlm_labels = labels.clone()
1288        else:
1289            mlm_labels = labels.clone()
1290            mlm_labels[labels == input_flat] = -100
1291
1292        valid_mask = (mlm_labels != -100)
1293
1294        # Rare fallback: if no valid MLM targets exist, force one valid supervised token
1295        # from attended positions to keep CE finite and training alive.
1296        if valid_mask.sum().item() == 0:
1297            candidate_positions = torch.nonzero(attn_flat > 0, as_tuple=False)
1298            if candidate_positions.numel() > 0:
1299                first_idx = int(candidate_positions[0].item())
1300                mlm_labels[first_idx] = labels[first_idx]
1301                valid_mask = (mlm_labels != -100)
1302
1303        # Compute CE in float32 for numerical stability
1304        if valid_mask.sum().item() > 0:
1305            loss = F.cross_entropy(logits[valid_mask].float(), mlm_labels[valid_mask])
1306        else:
1307            # Defensive fallback (should almost never happen after forced target above)
1308            loss = logits.new_zeros((), requires_grad=True)
1309
1310        if isinstance(auxiliary_losses, dict):
1311            for aux_name, aux_loss in auxiliary_losses.items():
1312                if torch.is_tensor(aux_loss) and aux_loss.requires_grad:
1313                    if not torch.isfinite(aux_loss):
1314                        raise RuntimeError(
1315                            f"Non-finite auxiliary loss detected for {aux_name} during forward pass"
1316                        )
1317                    loss = loss + aux_loss
1318        
1319        # Compute accuracy on masked tokens
1320        with torch.no_grad():
1321            mask = valid_mask
1322            if mask.any():
1323                predictions = logits.argmax(dim=-1)
1324                correct = (predictions == mlm_labels) & mask
1325                accuracy = correct.sum().float() / mask.sum().float()
1326            else:
1327                accuracy = torch.tensor(0.0, device=logits.device)
1328        
1329        return loss, accuracy

Compute masked language modeling loss with shape safety checks.

Handles both HF-style labels (-100 on unmasked tokens) and raw-sequence labels (infers masked positions by comparing input and label token IDs). Includes a fallback that forces at least one valid supervised token when no MLM targets exist.

Arguments:
  • input_ids: Token ID tensor of shape (B, S).
  • attention_mask: Attention mask tensor of shape (B, S).
  • labels: Label tensor of shape (B, S).
Returns:

Tuple of (loss, accuracy) where loss is a scalar tensor and accuracy is a scalar tensor in [0, 1].

Raises:
  • RuntimeError: If non-finite logits are detected, or if tensor shapes are mismatched.
def train_epoch( self, dataloader: torch.utils.data.dataloader.DataLoader, epoch: int) -> Tuple[float, bool]: 
1331    def train_epoch(self, dataloader: DataLoader, epoch: int) -> Tuple[float, bool]:
1332        """
1333        Train for one epoch with advanced monitoring.
1334        
1335        Returns:
1336            Tuple[float, bool]: (average_loss, should_stop)
1337            should_stop is True if NaN was detected
1338        """
1339        self.model.train()
1340        total_loss = 0.0
1341        total_accuracy = 0.0
1342        num_batches = 0
1343        grad_norm = 0.0
1344        self.current_epoch_had_inf = False
1345        current_epoch_had_zero = False
1346        
1347        # Progress bar with detailed metrics
1348        progress_bar = tqdm(
1349            dataloader, 
1350            desc=f"🚀 Epoch {epoch+1}",
1351            leave=True,
1352            ncols=120
1353        )
1354        epoch_started = time.perf_counter()
1355        
1356        self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1357        optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1358        
1359        for batch_idx, batch in enumerate(progress_bar):
1360            try:
1361                thermal_action = self._enforce_thermal_guard(epoch, batch_idx)
1362                if thermal_action != "none":
1363                    self._pending_thermal_repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1364                        self._pending_thermal_repair_action,
1365                        thermal_action,
1366                    )
1367                # Move to device
1368                batch = {k: v.to(self.device, non_blocking=True) for k, v in batch.items()}
1369                repair_action = self._pending_thermal_repair_action
1370                retry_count = 0
1371                batch_done = False
1372                amp_enabled = self.use_amp and str(self.device).startswith("cuda")
1373
1374                while retry_count <= self.training_config.max_nan_retries and not batch_done:
1375                    # Forward pass (AMP if enabled)
1376                    with autocast(self.device, enabled=amp_enabled, dtype=self.amp_dtype):
1377                        loss, accuracy = self.compute_mlm_loss(
1378                            batch['input_ids'],
1379                            batch['attention_mask'],
1380                            batch['labels']
1381                        )
1382
1383                        if self._check_for_nan(loss * self.gradient_accumulation_steps, batch_idx, batch):
1384                            repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1385                                repair_action,
1386                                f"nan_loss_retry_{retry_count + 1}",
1387                            )
1388                            self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1389                            self._scale_learning_rate(0.5)
1390                            retry_count += 1
1391
1392                            if retry_count > self.training_config.max_nan_retries:
1393                                try:
1394                                    emergency_path = self.save_checkpoint(epoch, suffix="_nan_emergency")
1395                                    logging.error(f"Emergency checkpoint saved: {emergency_path}")
1396                                except Exception as e:
1397                                    logging.error(f"Failed to save emergency checkpoint: {e}")
1398                                return total_loss / max(num_batches, 1), True
1399                            continue
1400
1401                        raw_loss = loss.item()
1402                        scaled_loss = loss / self.gradient_accumulation_steps
1403
1404                    # Backward pass
1405                    if amp_enabled:
1406                        self.scaler.scale(scaled_loss).backward()
1407                    else:
1408                        scaled_loss.backward()
1409
1410                    grad_stats = self._inspect_gradients()
1411                    current_epoch_had_zero = current_epoch_had_zero or grad_stats["has_zero"]
1412
1413                    # Repair policy for NaN gradients: skip step, zero grad, LR*0.75 retry up to N times
1414                    if grad_stats["has_nan"]:
1415                        repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1416                            repair_action,
1417                            f"nan_grad_retry_{retry_count + 1}",
1418                        )
1419                        self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1420                        self._scale_learning_rate(0.75)  # Less aggressive reduction (was 0.5)
1421                        retry_count += 1
1422
1423                        if retry_count > self.training_config.max_nan_retries:
1424                            logging.error(
1425                                "NaN gradients persisted after retries. Saving checkpoint and stopping training."
1426                            )
1427                            try:
1428                                emergency_path = self.save_checkpoint(epoch, suffix="_nan_grad_emergency")
1429                                logging.error(f"Emergency checkpoint saved: {emergency_path}")
1430                            except Exception as e:
1431                                logging.error(f"Failed to save emergency checkpoint: {e}")
1432                            return total_loss / max(num_batches, 1), True
1433                        continue
1434
1435                    # Update every gradient_accumulation_steps
1436                    if (batch_idx + 1) % self.gradient_accumulation_steps == 0:
1437                        if amp_enabled:
1438                            self.scaler.unscale_(self.optimizer)
1439
1440                        self._apply_galore_projection()
1441
1442                        grad_norm = clip_grad_norm_(
1443                            self.model.parameters(),
1444                            max_norm=self.training_config.grad_clip_max_norm
1445                        )
1446                        grad_norm_value = grad_norm.item() if isinstance(grad_norm, torch.Tensor) else float(grad_norm)
1447                        clip_ratio = grad_norm_value / max(float(self.training_config.grad_clip_max_norm), 1e-12)
1448
1449                        telemetry_interval = max(int(self.training_config.telemetry_log_interval), 1)
1450                        should_log_heavy = ((self.global_step + 1) % telemetry_interval == 0)
1451                        gpu_telemetry = (
1452                            self._get_gpu_telemetry()
1453                            if should_log_heavy
1454                            else self._get_default_gpu_telemetry()
1455                        )
1456                        gpu_telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(gpu_telemetry)
1457                        block_grad_norms = (
1458                            self._collect_block_grad_norms()
1459                            if should_log_heavy
1460                            else self._get_default_block_grad_norms()
1461                        )
1462                        step_time_ms = (time.perf_counter() - optimizer_window_start) * 1000.0
1463                        effective_batch_size = int(batch['input_ids'].shape[0]) * self.gradient_accumulation_steps
1464                        token_count = effective_batch_size * int(batch['input_ids'].shape[1])
1465                        tokens_per_sec = float(token_count) / max(step_time_ms / 1000.0, 1e-9)
1466
1467                        post_clip_bad = (not math.isfinite(grad_norm_value)) or (
1468                            grad_norm_value > self.training_config.inf_post_clip_threshold
1469                        )
1470
1471                        # Repair policy for Inf/exploding gradients
1472                        if grad_stats["has_inf"] or post_clip_bad:
1473                            self.current_epoch_had_inf = True
1474                            repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1475                                repair_action,
1476                                "inf_skip_step_lr_half",
1477                            )
1478                            self._scale_learning_rate(0.5)
1479
1480                            self.global_step += 1
1481                            current_lr = self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]
1482                            self._log_step_to_csv(
1483                                epoch=epoch,
1484                                step=batch_idx,
1485                                loss=raw_loss,
1486                                accuracy=accuracy.item(),
1487                                lr=current_lr,
1488                                grad_norm=grad_norm_value,
1489                                has_nan=grad_stats["has_nan"],
1490                                has_inf=True,
1491                                has_zero=grad_stats["has_zero"],
1492                                repair_action=repair_action,
1493                                gpu_telemetry=gpu_telemetry,
1494                                block_grad_norms=block_grad_norms,
1495                                step_time_ms=step_time_ms,
1496                                tokens_per_sec=tokens_per_sec,
1497                                clip_ratio=clip_ratio,
1498                                effective_batch_size=effective_batch_size,
1499                            )
1500                            self._pending_thermal_repair_action = "none"
1501                            self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1502                            optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1503                            batch_done = True
1504                            continue
1505
1506                        # Normal optimizer step
1507                        if amp_enabled:
1508                            self.scaler.step(self.optimizer)
1509                            self.scaler.update()
1510                        else:
1511                            self.optimizer.step()
1512
1513                        self.scheduler.step()
1514                        self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1515
1516                        self.global_step += 1
1517                        current_lr = self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]
1518                        self._log_step_to_csv(
1519                            epoch=epoch,
1520                            step=batch_idx,
1521                            loss=raw_loss,
1522                            accuracy=accuracy.item(),
1523                            lr=current_lr,
1524                            grad_norm=grad_norm_value,
1525                            has_nan=grad_stats["has_nan"],
1526                            has_inf=grad_stats["has_inf"],
1527                            has_zero=grad_stats["has_zero"],
1528                            repair_action=repair_action,
1529                            gpu_telemetry=gpu_telemetry,
1530                            block_grad_norms=block_grad_norms,
1531                            step_time_ms=step_time_ms,
1532                            tokens_per_sec=tokens_per_sec,
1533                            clip_ratio=clip_ratio,
1534                            effective_batch_size=effective_batch_size,
1535                        )
1536                        self._pending_thermal_repair_action = "none"
1537                        optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1538
1539                        if self.global_step % self.training_config.checkpoint_every_n_steps == 0:
1540                            self._save_rolling_checkpoint(epoch)
1541
1542                        self._maybe_save_best_checkpoint(epoch, raw_loss)
1543
1544                    # Accumulate metrics
1545                    total_loss += raw_loss
1546                    total_accuracy += accuracy.item()
1547                    num_batches += 1
1548                    batch_done = True
1549
1550                if not batch_done:
1551                    return total_loss / max(num_batches, 1), True
1552                
1553                # Update progress bar
1554                current_lr = self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]
1555                progress_bar.set_postfix({
1556                    'loss': f'{(total_loss / max(num_batches, 1)):.4f}',
1557                    'acc': f'{accuracy.item():.3f}',
1558                    'lr': f'{current_lr:.2e}',
1559                    'step': self.global_step
1560                })
1561                
1562                # Memory management every 50 steps
1563                if batch_idx % 50 == 0 and torch.cuda.is_available():
1564                    torch.cuda.empty_cache()
1565                
1566                # Detailed logging every 100 steps
1567                if batch_idx % 100 == 0 and batch_idx > 0:
1568                    avg_loss = total_loss / num_batches
1569                    avg_acc = total_accuracy / num_batches
1570                    progress_snapshot = tqdm.format_meter(
1571                        batch_idx + 1,
1572                        len(dataloader),
1573                        time.perf_counter() - epoch_started,
1574                    )
1575                    logging.info("Progress %s", progress_snapshot)
1576                    
1577                    if torch.cuda.is_available():
1578                        memory_used = torch.cuda.memory_allocated() / 1024**3
1579                        memory_cached = torch.cuda.memory_reserved() / 1024**3
1580                        logging.info(
1581                            f"Step {self.global_step}: Loss={avg_loss:.4f}, "
1582                            f"Acc={avg_acc:.3f}, GPU={memory_used:.2f}GB"
1583                        )
1584                
1585            except RuntimeError as e:
1586                if isinstance(e, GPUTelemetryError):
1587                    telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(self._get_default_gpu_telemetry())
1588                    self._log_step_to_csv(
1589                        epoch=epoch,
1590                        step=batch_idx,
1591                        loss=float("nan"),
1592                        accuracy=0.0,
1593                        lr=self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0],
1594                        grad_norm=0.0,
1595                        has_nan=False,
1596                        has_inf=True,
1597                        has_zero=False,
1598                        repair_action="telemetry_fatal_stop",
1599                        gpu_telemetry=telemetry,
1600                        block_grad_norms=self._get_default_block_grad_norms(),
1601                        step_time_ms=0.0,
1602                        tokens_per_sec=0.0,
1603                        clip_ratio=0.0,
1604                        effective_batch_size=0,
1605                    )
1606                    logging.error(
1607                        "Fatal GPU telemetry error at batch %s: %s. Stopping training immediately.",
1608                        batch_idx,
1609                        e,
1610                    )
1611                    raise
1612                if self._switch_to_cpu_only_after_gpu_error(exc=e, epoch=epoch, batch_idx=batch_idx):
1613                    telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(self._get_default_gpu_telemetry())
1614                    self._log_step_to_csv(
1615                        epoch=epoch,
1616                        step=batch_idx,
1617                        loss=float("nan"),
1618                        accuracy=0.0,
1619                        lr=self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0],
1620                        grad_norm=0.0,
1621                        has_nan=False,
1622                        has_inf=True,
1623                        has_zero=False,
1624                        repair_action="thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error",
1625                        gpu_telemetry=telemetry,
1626                        block_grad_norms=self._get_default_block_grad_norms(),
1627                        step_time_ms=0.0,
1628                        tokens_per_sec=0.0,
1629                        clip_ratio=0.0,
1630                        effective_batch_size=0,
1631                    )
1632                    self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1633                    self._pending_thermal_repair_action = self._append_repair_action(
1634                        self._pending_thermal_repair_action,
1635                        "thermal_cpu_only_gpu_error",
1636                    )
1637                    optimizer_window_start = time.perf_counter()
1638                    continue
1639                if "out of memory" in str(e):
1640                    telemetry = self._merge_guard_temperature(self._get_default_gpu_telemetry())
1641                    self._log_step_to_csv(
1642                        epoch=epoch,
1643                        step=batch_idx,
1644                        loss=float("nan"),
1645                        accuracy=0.0,
1646                        lr=self.scheduler.get_last_lr()[0],
1647                        grad_norm=0.0,
1648                        has_nan=False,
1649                        has_inf=False,
1650                        has_zero=False,
1651                        repair_action="oom_skip_batch",
1652                        gpu_telemetry=telemetry,
1653                        block_grad_norms=self._get_default_block_grad_norms(),
1654                        step_time_ms=0.0,
1655                        tokens_per_sec=0.0,
1656                        clip_ratio=0.0,
1657                        effective_batch_size=0,
1658                    )
1659                    logging.error(f"OOM at batch {batch_idx}, clearing cache and continuing...")
1660                    if torch.cuda.is_available():
1661                        torch.cuda.empty_cache()
1662                    self.optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
1663                    continue
1664                else:
1665                    raise e
1666        
1667        # Final epoch metrics
1668        avg_loss = total_loss / max(num_batches, 1)
1669        avg_accuracy = total_accuracy / max(num_batches, 1)
1670        
1671        # Update best loss / plateau tracking
1672        if avg_loss < self.best_loss:
1673            self.best_loss = avg_loss
1674            self.non_improving_epochs = 0
1675            logging.info(f"🎉 New best loss: {self.best_loss:.4f}")
1676        else:
1677            self.non_improving_epochs += 1
1678
1679        if self.current_epoch_had_inf:
1680            self.consecutive_inf_epochs += 1
1681        else:
1682            self.consecutive_inf_epochs = 0
1683
1684        if current_epoch_had_zero and self.non_improving_epochs >= self.training_config.zero_grad_plateau_patience:
1685            self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs += 1
1686        else:
1687            self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs = 0
1688        
1689        logging.info(
1690            f"📊 Epoch {epoch+1} Summary: "
1691            f"Loss={avg_loss:.4f}, Accuracy={avg_accuracy:.3f}, "
1692            f"Best Loss={self.best_loss:.4f}, "
1693            f"InfEpochs={self.consecutive_inf_epochs}, "
1694            f"ZeroGradPlateauEpochs={self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs}"
1695        )
1696
1697        # Early stop policy: unrecoverable exploding gradients across epochs
1698        if self.consecutive_inf_epochs > self.training_config.inf_epoch_patience:
1699            logging.error(
1700                "Early stop: Inf/exploding gradients persisted for too many consecutive epochs."
1701            )
1702            return avg_loss, True
1703
1704        # Early stop policy: vanishing gradients + plateau persistence
1705        if self.consecutive_zero_grad_plateau_epochs >= 1:
1706            logging.error(
1707                "Early stop: persistent near-zero gradients with plateaued loss detected."
1708            )
1709            return avg_loss, True
1710        
1711        return avg_loss, False  # No NaN detected

Train for one epoch with advanced monitoring.

Returns:

Tuple[float, bool]: (average_loss, should_stop) should_stop is True if NaN was detected

def close(self): 
1795    def close(self):
1796        """Cleanup resources"""
1797        if self.csv_file:
1798            self.csv_file.close()
1799            logging.info(f"📊 CSV log closed: {self.training_config.csv_log_path}")

Cleanup resources

def save_checkpoint(self, epoch: int, suffix: str = '', path: str = 'checkpoints') -> str: 
1801    def save_checkpoint(self, epoch: int, suffix: str = "", path: str = "checkpoints") -> str:
1802        """Save a comprehensive training checkpoint.
1803
1804        Includes model state, optimizer state, scheduler state, AMP scaler
1805        state, config, global step, and best loss.
1806
1807        Args:
1808            epoch: Current epoch number.
1809            suffix: Optional filename suffix (e.g. ``"_epoch_end"``).
1810            path: Directory to save the checkpoint in.
1811
1812        Returns:
1813            Absolute path to the saved checkpoint file.
1814        """
1815        os.makedirs(path, exist_ok=True)
1816        
1817        checkpoint = {
1818            'epoch': epoch,
1819            'global_step': self.global_step,
1820            'model_state_dict': self.model.state_dict(),
1821            'optimizer_state_dict': self.optimizer.state_dict(),
1822            'scheduler_state_dict': self.scheduler.state_dict(),
1823            'scaler_state_dict': self.scaler.state_dict(),
1824            'config': self.config,
1825            'best_loss': self.best_loss,
1826            'model_class': self.model.__class__.__name__
1827        }
1828        
1829        filename = f"titan_checkpoint_epoch_{epoch}{suffix}.pt"
1830        checkpoint_path = os.path.join(path, filename)
1831        
1832        torch.save(checkpoint, checkpoint_path)
1833        
1834        # Register with storage manager
1835        if self.storage_manager.register_file(checkpoint_path):
1836            logging.info(f"💾 Checkpoint saved: {checkpoint_path}")
1837        else:
1838            logging.warning(f"⚠️ Checkpoint saved but storage limit warning")
1839        
1840        return checkpoint_path

Save a comprehensive training checkpoint.

Includes model state, optimizer state, scheduler state, AMP scaler state, config, global step, and best loss.

Arguments:
  • epoch: Current epoch number.
  • suffix: Optional filename suffix (e.g. "_epoch_end").
  • path: Directory to save the checkpoint in.
Returns:

Absolute path to the saved checkpoint file.

def load_checkpoint(self, checkpoint_path: str): 
1842    def load_checkpoint(self, checkpoint_path: str):
1843        """Load a checkpoint and resume training state.
1844
1845        Restores model weights, optimizer state, scheduler state, AMP
1846        scaler state, global step, and best loss.
1847
1848        Args:
1849            checkpoint_path: Path to the checkpoint file.
1850
1851        Returns:
1852            The epoch number from the loaded checkpoint.
1853        """
1854        logging.info(f"📂 Loading checkpoint: {checkpoint_path}")
1855        
1856        checkpoint = torch.load(checkpoint_path, map_location=self.device)
1857        
1858        self.model.load_state_dict(checkpoint['model_state_dict'])
1859        self.optimizer.load_state_dict(checkpoint['optimizer_state_dict'])
1860        self.scheduler.load_state_dict(checkpoint['scheduler_state_dict'])
1861        self.scaler.load_state_dict(checkpoint['scaler_state_dict'])
1862        
1863        self.global_step = checkpoint['global_step']
1864        self.best_loss = checkpoint['best_loss']
1865        
1866        logging.info(f"✅ Checkpoint loaded - Global Step: {self.global_step}, Best Loss: {self.best_loss:.4f}")
1867        
1868        return checkpoint['epoch']

Load a checkpoint and resume training state.

Restores model weights, optimizer state, scheduler state, AMP scaler state, global step, and best loss.

Arguments:
  • checkpoint_path: Path to the checkpoint file.
Returns:

The epoch number from the loaded checkpoint.

def save_pretrained_artifacts(self, output_dir: str, tokenizer: Any = None): 
1870    def save_pretrained_artifacts(self, output_dir: str, tokenizer: Any = None):
1871        """Save HuggingFace-compatible model and tokenizer artifacts.
1872
1873        Args:
1874            output_dir: Directory to save artifacts in.
1875            tokenizer: Optional tokenizer with ``save_pretrained`` support.
1876
1877        Raises:
1878            RuntimeError: If the model does not support ``save_pretrained``.
1879        """
1880        if not hasattr(self.model, "save_pretrained"):
1881            raise RuntimeError("Current model does not support save_pretrained")
1882
1883        os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
1884        self.model.save_pretrained(output_dir)
1885        logging.info("💾 Saved model with save_pretrained: %s", output_dir)
1886
1887        if tokenizer is not None and hasattr(tokenizer, "save_pretrained"):
1888            tokenizer.save_pretrained(output_dir)
1889            logging.info("💾 Saved tokenizer with save_pretrained: %s", output_dir)

Save HuggingFace-compatible model and tokenizer artifacts.

Arguments:
  • output_dir: Directory to save artifacts in.
  • tokenizer: Optional tokenizer with save_pretrained support.
Raises:
  • RuntimeError: If the model does not support save_pretrained.
